authors_text: Haibo Yang,Shengjie Zhang,Xiaoyang Han,Botao Zhao,Yan Ren,Yaru Sheng,Xiao-Yong Zhang
title: Denoising of 3D MR images using a voxel-wise hybrid residual MLP-CNN model to improve small lesion diagnostic confidence
title_zh: 使用体素混合残差 MLP-CNN 模型对 3D MR 图像进行去噪，以提高小病变诊断的置信度
abstract: Small lesions in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) images are crucial for clinical diagnosis of many kinds of diseases. However, the MRI quality can be easily degraded by various noise, which can greatly affect the accuracy of diagnosis of small lesion. Although some methods for denoising MR images have been proposed, task-specific denoising methods for improving the diagnosis confidence of small lesions are lacking. In this work, we propose a voxel-wise hybrid residual MLP-CNN model to denoise three-dimensional (3D) MR images with small lesions. We combine basic deep learning architecture, MLP and CNN, to obtain an appropriate inherent bias for the image denoising and integrate each output layers in MLP and CNN by adding residual connections to leverage long-range information. We evaluate the proposed method on 720 T2-FLAIR brain images with small lesions at different noise levels. The results show the superiority of our method in both quantitative and visual evaluations on testing dataset compared to state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, two experienced radiologists agreed that at moderate and high noise levels, our method outperforms other methods in terms of recovery of small lesions and overall image denoising quality. The implementation of our method is available at https://github.com/laowangbobo/Residual_MLP_CNN_Mixer.
summary: Small lesions in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) images are crucial for clinical diagnosis of many kinds of diseases. However, the MRI quality can be easily degraded by various noise, which can greatly affect the accuracy of diagnosis of small lesion. Although some methods for denoising MR images have been proposed, task-specific denoising methods for improving the diagnosis confidence of small lesions are lacking. In this work, we propose a voxel-wise hybrid residual MLP-CNN model to denoise three-dimensional (3D) MR images with small lesions. We combine basic deep learning architecture, MLP and CNN, to obtain an appropriate inherent bias for the image denoising and integrate each output layers in MLP and CNN by adding residual connections to leverage long-range information. We evaluate the proposed method on 720 T2-FLAIR brain images with small lesions at different noise levels. The results show the superiority of our method in both quantitative and visual evaluations on testing dataset compared to state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, two experienced radiologists agreed that at moderate and high noise levels, our method outperforms other methods in terms of recovery of small lesions and overall image denoising quality. The implementation of our method is available at https://github.com/laowangbobo/Residual_MLP_CNN_Mixer.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像（MRI）图像中的小病灶对于多种疾病的临床诊断至关重要。然而，MRI质量很容易受到各种噪声的影响而降低，这会极大地影响小病灶诊断的准确性。尽管已经提出了一些MR图像去噪方法，但缺乏用于提高小病灶诊断置信度的特定任务去噪方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种体素混合残差 MLP-CNN 模型来对具有小病变的三维 (3D) MR 图像进行去噪。我们结合了基本的深度学习架构、MLP 和 CNN，以获得图像去噪的适当固有偏差，并通过添加残差连接来集成 MLP 和 CNN 中的每个输出层以利用远程信息。我们在 720 张具有不同噪声水平的小病变的 T2-FLAIR 大脑图像上评估了所提出的方法。结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在测试数据集的定量和视觉评估方面均具有优越性。此外，两位经验丰富的放射科医生一致认为，在中等和高噪声水平下，我们的方法在小病灶的恢复和整体图像去噪质量方面优于其他方法。我们的方法的实现可以在 https://github.com/laowangbobo/Residual_MLP_CNN_Mixer 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于体素的混合残差MLP-CNN模型，用于提升3D MRI图像中小病变的诊断置信度。
AI.motivation: MRI图像中的小病变对疾病诊断至关重要，但噪声会显著降低诊断准确性，现有去噪方法缺乏针对小病变诊断置信度提升的专用方案。
AI.method: 结合MLP与CNN基础架构，通过残差连接整合两者输出层，利用残差网络捕捉长距离信息，实现3D MRI图像的体素级去噪。
AI.result: 在720张不同噪声水平的T2-FLAIR脑部图像测试中，定量和视觉评估均优于现有方法，且两位放射科医生确认其在中高噪声水平下更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升MRI图像去噪质量及小病变恢复能力，为临床诊断提供可靠支持。

authors_text: Guoliang Lin,Yongheng Xu,Hanjiang Lai,Jian Yin
title: Revisiting Few-Shot Learning from a Causal Perspective
title_zh: 从因果角度重新审视少样本学习
abstract: Few-shot learning with $N$-way $K$-shot scheme is an open challenge in machine learning. Many metric-based approaches have been proposed to tackle this problem, e.g., the Matching Networks and CLIP-Adapter. Despite that these approaches have shown significant progress, the mechanism of why these methods succeed has not been well explored. In this paper, we try to interpret these metric-based few-shot learning methods via causal mechanism. We show that the existing approaches can be viewed as specific forms of front-door adjustment, which can alleviate the effect of spurious correlations and thus learn the causality. This causal interpretation could provide us a new perspective to better understand these existing metric-based methods. Further, based on this causal interpretation, we simply introduce two causal methods for metric-based few-shot learning, which considers not only the relationship between examples but also the diversity of representations. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed methods in few-shot classification on various benchmark datasets. Code is available in https://github.com/lingl1024/causalFewShot.
summary: Few-shot learning with $N$-way $K$-shot scheme is an open challenge in machine learning. Many metric-based approaches have been proposed to tackle this problem, e.g., the Matching Networks and CLIP-Adapter. Despite that these approaches have shown significant progress, the mechanism of why these methods succeed has not been well explored. In this paper, we try to interpret these metric-based few-shot learning methods via causal mechanism. We show that the existing approaches can be viewed as specific forms of front-door adjustment, which can alleviate the effect of spurious correlations and thus learn the causality. This causal interpretation could provide us a new perspective to better understand these existing metric-based methods. Further, based on this causal interpretation, we simply introduce two causal methods for metric-based few-shot learning, which considers not only the relationship between examples but also the diversity of representations. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed methods in few-shot classification on various benchmark datasets. Code is available in https://github.com/lingl1024/causalFewShot.
abstract_zh: 使用 $N$-way $K$-shot 方案进行少样本学习是机器学习中的一个公开挑战。人们提出了许多基于度量的方法来解决这个问题，例如匹配网络和 CLIP 适配器。尽管这些方法已经取得了重大进展，但这些方法成功的机制尚未得到很好的探索。在本文中，我们尝试通过因果机制解释这些基于度量的小样本学习方法。我们表明，现有的方法可以被视为前门调整的特定形式，它可以减轻虚假相关性的影响，从而了解因果关系。这种因果解释可以为我们提供一个新的视角，以更好地理解这些现有的基于度量的方法。此外，基于这种因果解释，我们简单地介绍了两种基于度量的小样本学习的因果方法，它不仅考虑了示例之间的关系，还考虑了表示的多样性。实验结果证明了我们提出的方法在各种基准数据集上的少样本分类中的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/lingl1024/causalFewShot 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文从因果机制的角度重新审视少样本学习方法，提出了一种新的因果解释，并基于此提出两种改进的少样本学习方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管少样本学习方法在实践中表现出色，但其成功机制尚未被深入探索。现有方法未能充分解释如何缓解虚假相关性问题，从而学习到因果关系。
AI.method: 本文将现有基于度量的少样本学习方法解释为特定形式的前门调整，并提出两种考虑示例间关系和表示多样性的因果方法。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，本文提出的方法在多个基准数据集上的少样本分类任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 从因果机制的角度解释少样本学习方法，可以提供新的视角，并为设计更有效的少样本学习方法提供理论支持。

authors_text: Wujun Wen,Yunheng Li,Zhuben Dong,Lin Feng,Wanxiao Yang,Shenlan Liu
title: Streaming Video Temporal Action Segmentation In Real Time
title_zh: 实时流视频时间动作分割
abstract: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) is a critical step toward long-term video understanding. Recent studies follow a pattern that builds models based on features instead of raw video picture information. However, we claim those models are trained complicatedly and limit application scenarios. It is hard for them to segment human actions of video in real time because they must work after the full video features are extracted. As the real-time action segmentation task is different from TAS task, we define it as streaming video real-time temporal action segmentation (SVTAS) task. In this paper, we propose a real-time end-to-end multi-modality model for SVTAS task. More specifically, under the circumstances that we cannot get any future information, we segment the current human action of streaming video chunk in real time. Furthermore, the model we propose combines the last steaming video chunk feature extracted by language model with the current image feature extracted by image model to improve the quantity of real-time temporal action segmentation. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first multi-modality real-time temporal action segmentation model. Under the same evaluation criteria as full video temporal action segmentation, our model segments human action in real time with less than 40% of state-of-the-art model computation and achieves 90% of the accuracy of the full video state-of-the-art model.
summary: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) is a critical step toward long-term video understanding. Recent studies follow a pattern that builds models based on features instead of raw video picture information. However, we claim those models are trained complicatedly and limit application scenarios. It is hard for them to segment human actions of video in real time because they must work after the full video features are extracted. As the real-time action segmentation task is different from TAS task, we define it as streaming video real-time temporal action segmentation (SVTAS) task. In this paper, we propose a real-time end-to-end multi-modality model for SVTAS task. More specifically, under the circumstances that we cannot get any future information, we segment the current human action of streaming video chunk in real time. Furthermore, the model we propose combines the last steaming video chunk feature extracted by language model with the current image feature extracted by image model to improve the quantity of real-time temporal action segmentation. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first multi-modality real-time temporal action segmentation model. Under the same evaluation criteria as full video temporal action segmentation, our model segments human action in real time with less than 40% of state-of-the-art model computation and achieves 90% of the accuracy of the full video state-of-the-art model.
abstract_zh: 时间动作分割（TAS）是实现长期视频理解的关键一步。最近的研究遵循一种基于特征而不是原始视频图片信息构建模型的模式。然而，我们声称这些模型训练复杂并且限制了应用场景。他们很难实时分割视频中的人类动作，因为它们必须在提取完整的视频特征后才能工作。由于实时动作分割任务与TAS任务不同，我们将其定义为流视频实时时间动作分割（SVTAS）任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 SVTAS 任务的实时端到端多模态模型。更具体地说，在我们无法获得任何未来信息的情况下，我们实时分割流视频块的当前人类动作。此外，我们提出的模型将语言模型提取的最后一个流视频块特征与图像模型提取的当前图像特征相结合，以提高实时时间动作分割的质量。据我们所知，它是第一个多模态实时时间动作分割模型。在与全视频时间动作分割相同的评估标准下，我们的模型以不到最先进模型计算量的 40% 实时分割人体动作，并达到全视频最先进模型的 90% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时端到端多模态模型，用于流视频实时时序动作分割（SVTAS）任务。
AI.motivation: 现有模型依赖完整视频特征提取，难以实现实时动作分割，且计算复杂度高，限制了应用场景。
AI.method: 在无法获取未来信息的前提下，结合语言模型提取的前序视频块特征与图像模型提取的当前帧特征，构建多模态实时分割模型。
AI.result: 在相同评估标准下，模型计算量仅为现有最优模型的40%，准确率达到其90%。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出多模态实时时序动作分割模型，在保证精度的同时显著降低计算资源需求，适用于实时场景。

search_text: Streaming Video Temporal Action Segmentation In Real Time 实时流视频时间动作分割 Temporal action segmentation (TAS) is a critical step toward long-term video understanding. Recent studies follow a pattern that builds models based on features instead of raw video picture information. However, we claim those models are trained complicatedly and limit application scenarios. It is hard for them to segment human actions of video in real time because they must work after the full video features are extracted. As the real-time action segmentation task is different from TAS task, we define it as streaming video real-time temporal action segmentation (SVTAS) task. In this paper, we propose a real-time end-to-end multi-modality model for SVTAS task. More specifically, under the circumstances that we cannot get any future information, we segment the current human action of streaming video chunk in real time. Furthermore, the model we propose combines the last steaming video chunk feature extracted by language model with the current image feature extracted by image model to improve the quantity of real-time temporal action segmentation. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first multi-modality real-time temporal action segmentation model. Under the same evaluation criteria as full video temporal action segmentation, our model segments human action in real time with less than 40% of state-of-the-art model computation and achieves 90% of the accuracy of the full video state-of-the-art model. 时间动作分割（TAS）是实现长期视频理解的关键一步。最近的研究遵循一种基于特征而不是原始视频图片信息构建模型的模式。然而，我们声称这些模型训练复杂并且限制了应用场景。他们很难实时分割视频中的人类动作，因为它们必须在提取完整的视频特征后才能工作。由于实时动作分割任务与TAS任务不同，我们将其定义为流视频实时时间动作分割（SVTAS）任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 SVTAS 任务的实时端到端多模态模型。更具体地说，在我们无法获得任何未来信息的情况下，我们实时分割流视频块的当前人类动作。此外，我们提出的模型将语言模型提取的最后一个流视频块特征与图像模型提取的当前图像特征相结合，以提高实时时间动作分割的质量。据我们所知，它是第一个多模态实时时间动作分割模型。在与全视频时间动作分割相同的评估标准下，我们的模型以不到最先进模型计算量的 40% 实时分割人体动作，并达到全视频最先进模型的 90% 的准确率。 本文提出一种实时端到端多模态模型，用于流视频实时时序动作分割（SVTAS）任务。 Wujun Wen,Yunheng Li,Zhuben Dong,Lin Feng,Wanxiao Yang,Shenlan Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Xiangcheng Liu,Tianyi Wu,Guodong Guo
title: Adaptive Sparse ViT: Towards Learnable Adaptive Token Pruning by Fully Exploiting Self-Attention
title_zh: 自适应稀疏 ViT：通过充分利用自注意力实现可学习的自适应令牌剪枝
comment: Accepted by IJCAI2023. Code URL: https://github.com/Cydia2018/AS-ViT
comments: Accepted by IJCAI2023. Code URL: https://github.com/Cydia2018/AS-ViT
abstract: Vision transformer has emerged as a new paradigm in computer vision, showing excellent performance while accompanied by expensive computational cost. Image token pruning is one of the main approaches for ViT compression, due to the facts that the complexity is quadratic with respect to the token number, and many tokens containing only background regions do not truly contribute to the final prediction. Existing works either rely on additional modules to score the importance of individual tokens, or implement a fixed ratio pruning strategy for different input instances. In this work, we propose an adaptive sparse token pruning framework with a minimal cost. Specifically, we firstly propose an inexpensive attention head importance weighted class attention scoring mechanism. Then, learnable parameters are inserted as thresholds to distinguish informative tokens from unimportant ones. By comparing token attention scores and thresholds, we can discard useless tokens hierarchically and thus accelerate inference. The learnable thresholds are optimized in budget-aware training to balance accuracy and complexity, performing the corresponding pruning configurations for different input instances. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Our method improves the throughput of DeiT-S by 50% and brings only 0.2% drop in top-1 accuracy, which achieves a better trade-off between accuracy and latency than the previous methods.
summary: Vision transformer has emerged as a new paradigm in computer vision, showing excellent performance while accompanied by expensive computational cost. Image token pruning is one of the main approaches for ViT compression, due to the facts that the complexity is quadratic with respect to the token number, and many tokens containing only background regions do not truly contribute to the final prediction. Existing works either rely on additional modules to score the importance of individual tokens, or implement a fixed ratio pruning strategy for different input instances. In this work, we propose an adaptive sparse token pruning framework with a minimal cost. Specifically, we firstly propose an inexpensive attention head importance weighted class attention scoring mechanism. Then, learnable parameters are inserted as thresholds to distinguish informative tokens from unimportant ones. By comparing token attention scores and thresholds, we can discard useless tokens hierarchically and thus accelerate inference. The learnable thresholds are optimized in budget-aware training to balance accuracy and complexity, performing the corresponding pruning configurations for different input instances. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Our method improves the throughput of DeiT-S by 50% and brings only 0.2% drop in top-1 accuracy, which achieves a better trade-off between accuracy and latency than the previous methods.
abstract_zh: 视觉变压器已成为计算机视觉的新范例，表现出优异的性能，同时伴随着昂贵的计算成本。图像令牌剪枝是 ViT 压缩的主要方法之一，因为复杂度与令牌数量成二次方，并且许多仅包含背景区域的令牌并不能真正对最终预测做出贡献。现有的工作要么依赖额外的模块来对各个标记的重要性进行评分，要么针对不同的输入实例实施固定比例的修剪策略。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种成本最小的自适应稀疏令牌修剪框架。具体来说，我们首先提出了一种廉价的注意力头重要性加权类别注意力评分机制。然后，插入可学习的参数作为阈值，以区分信息丰富的标记和不重要的标记。通过比较 token 注意力分数和阈值，我们可以分层丢弃无用的 token，从而加速推理。可学习阈值在预算感知训练中进行优化，以平衡准确性和复杂性，针对不同的输入实例执行相应的剪枝配置。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。我们的方法将 DeiT-S 的吞吐量提高了 50%，而 top-1 准确率仅下降 0.2%，与之前的方法相比，在准确率和延迟之间实现了更好的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应稀疏ViT框架，通过可学习的阈值机制实现图像令牌的层次化剪枝，以在保持精度的同时提升推理速度。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer(ViT)虽性能优异但计算成本高昂，现有剪枝方法依赖额外模块或固定比例策略，难以兼顾不同输入实例的效率与精度平衡。
AI.method: 设计基于注意力头重要性加权的类别注意力评分机制，插入可学习参数作为阈值区分重要令牌与无用令牌，通过动态比较注意力得分与阈值实现层次化剪枝，并在预算感知训练中优化阈值以平衡精度与复杂度。
AI.result: 在DeiT-S模型上实现50%的吞吐量提升，仅损失0.2%的top-1准确率，在精度与延迟的权衡上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自适应剪枝机制有效降低了ViT的计算开销，在保持高精度的同时显著提升推理效率，为视觉Transformer压缩提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Maoxun Yuan,Yinyan Wang,Xingxing Wei
title: Translation, Scale and Rotation: Cross-Modal Alignment Meets RGB-Infrared Vehicle Detection
title_zh: 平移、缩放和旋转：跨模态对准与 RGB 红外车辆检测的结合
abstract: Integrating multispectral data in object detection, especially visible and infrared images, has received great attention in recent years. Since visible (RGB) and infrared (IR) images can provide complementary information to handle light variations, the paired images are used in many fields, such as multispectral pedestrian detection, RGB-IR crowd counting and RGB-IR salient object detection. Compared with natural RGB-IR images, we find detection in aerial RGB-IR images suffers from cross-modal weakly misalignment problems, which are manifested in the position, size and angle deviations of the same object. In this paper, we mainly address the challenge of cross-modal weakly misalignment in aerial RGB-IR images. Specifically, we firstly explain and analyze the cause of the weakly misalignment problem. Then, we propose a Translation-Scale-Rotation Alignment (TSRA) module to address the problem by calibrating the feature maps from these two modalities. The module predicts the deviation between two modality objects through an alignment process and utilizes Modality-Selection (MS) strategy to improve the performance of alignment. Finally, a two-stream feature alignment detector (TSFADet) based on the TSRA module is constructed for RGB-IR object detection in aerial images. With comprehensive experiments on the public DroneVehicle datasets, we verify that our method reduces the effect of the cross-modal misalignment and achieve robust detection results.
summary: Integrating multispectral data in object detection, especially visible and infrared images, has received great attention in recent years. Since visible (RGB) and infrared (IR) images can provide complementary information to handle light variations, the paired images are used in many fields, such as multispectral pedestrian detection, RGB-IR crowd counting and RGB-IR salient object detection. Compared with natural RGB-IR images, we find detection in aerial RGB-IR images suffers from cross-modal weakly misalignment problems, which are manifested in the position, size and angle deviations of the same object. In this paper, we mainly address the challenge of cross-modal weakly misalignment in aerial RGB-IR images. Specifically, we firstly explain and analyze the cause of the weakly misalignment problem. Then, we propose a Translation-Scale-Rotation Alignment (TSRA) module to address the problem by calibrating the feature maps from these two modalities. The module predicts the deviation between two modality objects through an alignment process and utilizes Modality-Selection (MS) strategy to improve the performance of alignment. Finally, a two-stream feature alignment detector (TSFADet) based on the TSRA module is constructed for RGB-IR object detection in aerial images. With comprehensive experiments on the public DroneVehicle datasets, we verify that our method reduces the effect of the cross-modal misalignment and achieve robust detection results.
abstract_zh: 近年来，将多光谱数据整合到目标检测中，特别是可见光和红外图像，受到了极大的关注。由于可见光 (RGB) 和红外 (IR) 图像可以提供互补信息来处理光线变化，因此配对图像被用于许多领域，例如多光谱行人检测、RGB-IR 人群计数和 RGB-IR 显着物体检测。与自然RGB-IR图像相比，我们发现航空RGB-IR图像中的检测存在跨模态弱未对准问题，表现为同一物体的位置、大小和角度偏差。在本文中，我们主要解决航空 RGB-IR 图像中跨模态弱失准的挑战。具体来说，我们首先对弱不对中问题的原因进行解释和分析。然后，我们提出了平移-缩放-旋转对齐（TSRA）模块，通过校准这两种模式的特征图来解决该问题。该模块通过对齐过程预测两个模态对象之间的偏差，并利用模态选择（MS）策略来提高对齐的性能。最后，构建了基于 TSRA 模块的两流特征对齐检测器（TSFADet），用于航空图像中的 RGB-IR 目标检测。通过对公共 DroneVehicle 数据集的综合实验，我们验证了我们的方法减少了跨模态未对准的影响并实现了稳健的检测结果。

AI.tldr: 本文针对航拍RGB-红外图像中的跨模态弱对齐问题，提出了一种翻译-尺度-旋转对齐模块（TSRA）及双流特征对齐检测器（TSFADet），以提升多光谱车辆检测性能。
AI.motivation: 与自然场景的RGB-红外图像相比，航拍图像因拍摄角度、尺度差异等导致跨模态弱对齐问题更显著，现有方法难以有效校正此类偏差，影响检测精度。
AI.method: 通过分析弱对齐成因，设计TSRA模块预测并校正RGB与红外模态间的位移、尺度和角度偏差，结合模态选择策略优化对齐效果，最终构建基于TSRA的双流特征对齐检测框架TSFADet。
AI.result: 在DroneVehicle数据集上的实验表明，该方法有效缓解了跨模态对齐问题，在复杂光照条件下实现了鲁棒的车辆检测性能。
AI.conclusion: TSRA模块通过显式建模跨模态几何偏差，为航拍多光谱目标检测提供了新的解决方案，验证了特征对齐策略在提升检测鲁棒性中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文针对航拍RGB-红外图像中的跨模态弱对齐问题，提出了一种翻译-尺度-旋转对齐模块（TSRA）及双流特征对齐检测器（TSFADet），以提升多光谱车辆检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: 与自然场景的RGB-红外图像相比，航拍图像因拍摄角度、尺度差异等导致跨模态弱对齐问题更显著，现有方法难以有效校正此类偏差，影响检测精度。
ai_content.method: 通过分析弱对齐成因，设计TSRA模块预测并校正RGB与红外模态间的位移、尺度和角度偏差，结合模态选择策略优化对齐效果，最终构建基于TSRA的双流特征对齐检测框架TSFADet。
ai_content.result: 在DroneVehicle数据集上的实验表明，该方法有效缓解了跨模态对齐问题，在复杂光照条件下实现了鲁棒的车辆检测性能。
ai_content.conclusion: TSRA模块通过显式建模跨模态几何偏差，为航拍多光谱目标检测提供了新的解决方案，验证了特征对齐策略在提升检测鲁棒性中的有效性。

search_text: Translation, Scale and Rotation: Cross-Modal Alignment Meets RGB-Infrared Vehicle Detection 平移、缩放和旋转：跨模态对准与 RGB 红外车辆检测的结合 Integrating multispectral data in object detection, especially visible and infrared images, has received great attention in recent years. Since visible (RGB) and infrared (IR) images can provide complementary information to handle light variations, the paired images are used in many fields, such as multispectral pedestrian detection, RGB-IR crowd counting and RGB-IR salient object detection. Compared with natural RGB-IR images, we find detection in aerial RGB-IR images suffers from cross-modal weakly misalignment problems, which are manifested in the position, size and angle deviations of the same object. In this paper, we mainly address the challenge of cross-modal weakly misalignment in aerial RGB-IR images. Specifically, we firstly explain and analyze the cause of the weakly misalignment problem. Then, we propose a Translation-Scale-Rotation Alignment (TSRA) module to address the problem by calibrating the feature maps from these two modalities. The module predicts the deviation between two modality objects through an alignment process and utilizes Modality-Selection (MS) strategy to improve the performance of alignment. Finally, a two-stream feature alignment detector (TSFADet) based on the TSRA module is constructed for RGB-IR object detection in aerial images. With comprehensive experiments on the public DroneVehicle datasets, we verify that our method reduces the effect of the cross-modal misalignment and achieve robust detection results. 近年来，将多光谱数据整合到目标检测中，特别是可见光和红外图像，受到了极大的关注。由于可见光 (RGB) 和红外 (IR) 图像可以提供互补信息来处理光线变化，因此配对图像被用于许多领域，例如多光谱行人检测、RGB-IR 人群计数和 RGB-IR 显着物体检测。与自然RGB-IR图像相比，我们发现航空RGB-IR图像中的检测存在跨模态弱未对准问题，表现为同一物体的位置、大小和角度偏差。在本文中，我们主要解决航空 RGB-IR 图像中跨模态弱失准的挑战。具体来说，我们首先对弱不对中问题的原因进行解释和分析。然后，我们提出了平移-缩放-旋转对齐（TSRA）模块，通过校准这两种模式的特征图来解决该问题。该模块通过对齐过程预测两个模态对象之间的偏差，并利用模态选择（MS）策略来提高对齐的性能。最后，构建了基于 TSRA 模块的两流特征对齐检测器（TSFADet），用于航空图像中的 RGB-IR 目标检测。通过对公共 DroneVehicle 数据集的综合实验，我们验证了我们的方法减少了跨模态未对准的影响并实现了稳健的检测结果。 本文针对航拍RGB-红外图像中的跨模态弱对齐问题，提出了一种翻译-尺度-旋转对齐模块（TSRA）及双流特征对齐检测器（TSFADet），以提升多光谱车辆检测性能。 Maoxun Yuan,Yinyan Wang,Xingxing Wei cs.CV

authors_text: Md Ershadul Haque,Salah Uddin,Md Ariful Islam,Amira Khanom,Abdulla Suman,Manoranjan Paul
title: Analysis and prediction of heart stroke from ejection fraction and serum creatinine using LSTM deep learning approach
title_zh: 使用 LSTM 深度学习方法根据射血分数和血清肌酐分析和预测心脏病
abstract: The combination of big data and deep learning is a world-shattering technology that can greatly impact any objective if used properly. With the availability of a large volume of health care datasets and progressions in deep learning techniques, systems are now well equipped to predict the future trend of any health problems. From the literature survey, we found the SVM was used to predict the heart failure rate without relating objective factors. Utilizing the intensity of important historical information in electronic health records (EHR), we have built a smart and predictive model utilizing long short-term memory (LSTM) and predict the future trend of heart failure based on that health record. Hence the fundamental commitment of this work is to predict the failure of the heart using an LSTM based on the patient's electronic medicinal information. We have analyzed a dataset containing the medical records of 299 heart failure patients collected at the Faisalabad Institute of Cardiology and the Allied Hospital in Faisalabad (Punjab, Pakistan). The patients consisted of 105 women and 194 men and their ages ranged from 40 and 95 years old. The dataset contains 13 features, which report clinical, body, and lifestyle information responsible for heart failure. We have found an increasing trend in our analysis which will contribute to advancing the knowledge in the field of heart stroke prediction.
summary: The combination of big data and deep learning is a world-shattering technology that can greatly impact any objective if used properly. With the availability of a large volume of health care datasets and progressions in deep learning techniques, systems are now well equipped to predict the future trend of any health problems. From the literature survey, we found the SVM was used to predict the heart failure rate without relating objective factors. Utilizing the intensity of important historical information in electronic health records (EHR), we have built a smart and predictive model utilizing long short-term memory (LSTM) and predict the future trend of heart failure based on that health record. Hence the fundamental commitment of this work is to predict the failure of the heart using an LSTM based on the patient's electronic medicinal information. We have analyzed a dataset containing the medical records of 299 heart failure patients collected at the Faisalabad Institute of Cardiology and the Allied Hospital in Faisalabad (Punjab, Pakistan). The patients consisted of 105 women and 194 men and their ages ranged from 40 and 95 years old. The dataset contains 13 features, which report clinical, body, and lifestyle information responsible for heart failure. We have found an increasing trend in our analysis which will contribute to advancing the knowledge in the field of heart stroke prediction.
abstract_zh: 大数据和深度学习的结合是一项惊天动地的技术，如果使用得当，可以极大地影响任何目标。随着大量医疗保健数据集的出现和深度学习技术的进步，系统现在已经能够预测任何健康问题的未来趋势。通过文献调查，我们发现SVM用于预测心力衰竭发生率，而没有关联客观因素。利用电子健康记录 (EHR) 中重要历史信息的强度，我们利用长短期记忆 (LSTM) 构建了一个智能预测模型，并根据该健康记录预测心力衰竭的未来趋势。因此，这项工作的基本承诺是使用基于患者电子医疗信息的 LSTM 来预测心脏衰竭。我们分析了费萨拉巴德心脏病研究所和费萨拉巴德联合医院（巴基斯坦旁遮普邦）收集的包含 299 名心力衰竭患者医疗记录的数据集。患者包括105名女性和194名男性，年龄从40岁到95岁不等。该数据集包含 13 个特征，报告导致心力衰竭的临床、身体和生活方式信息。我们在分析中发现了不断增长的趋势，这将有助于推进心脏病预测领域的知识。

AI.tldr: 本文利用长短期记忆网络（LSTM）基于患者电子健康记录中的射血分数和血清肌酐等13项特征，构建预测心力衰竭的深度学习模型。
AI.motivation: 传统支持向量机（SVM）方法未能结合客观临床指标，而电子健康记录中的历史数据对预测心衰具有重要价值，需通过深度学习挖掘时序特征。
AI.method: 基于299例心衰患者（含105女性、194男性，年龄40-95岁）的电子健康记录数据集，采用LSTM网络模型分析13个临床、身体及生活方式特征的时序关联性。
AI.result: 分析发现心衰发生趋势呈上升态势，验证了LSTM模型在利用历史健康数据预测心衰方面的有效性，为该领域研究提供新思路。
AI.conclusion: LSTM深度学习方法能有效捕捉电子健康记录中的时序特征，为心衰预测提供新工具，后续需扩大数据规模以提升模型泛化能力。

authors_text: XianFeng Han,Huixian Cheng,Hang Jiang,Dehong He,Guoqiang Xiao
title: PCB-RandNet: Rethinking Random Sampling for LIDAR Semantic Segmentation in Autonomous Driving Scene
title_zh: PCB-RandNet：重新思考自动驾驶场景中激光雷达语义分割的随机采样
abstract: Fast and efficient semantic segmentation of large-scale LiDAR point clouds is a fundamental problem in autonomous driving. To achieve this goal, the existing point-based methods mainly choose to adopt Random Sampling strategy to process large-scale point clouds. However, our quantative and qualitative studies have found that Random Sampling may be less suitable for the autonomous driving scenario, since the LiDAR points follow an uneven or even long-tailed distribution across the space, which prevents the model from capturing sufficient information from points in different distance ranges and reduces the model's learning capability. To alleviate this problem, we propose a new Polar Cylinder Balanced Random Sampling method that enables the downsampled point clouds to maintain a more balanced distribution and improve the segmentation performance under different spatial distributions. In addition, a sampling consistency loss is introduced to further improve the segmentation performance and reduce the model's variance under different sampling methods. Extensive experiments confirm that our approach produces excellent performance on both SemanticKITTI and SemanticPOSS benchmarks, achieving a 2.8% and 4.0% improvement, respectively. The source code is available at https://github.com/huixiancheng/PCB-RandNet.
summary: Fast and efficient semantic segmentation of large-scale LiDAR point clouds is a fundamental problem in autonomous driving. To achieve this goal, the existing point-based methods mainly choose to adopt Random Sampling strategy to process large-scale point clouds. However, our quantative and qualitative studies have found that Random Sampling may be less suitable for the autonomous driving scenario, since the LiDAR points follow an uneven or even long-tailed distribution across the space, which prevents the model from capturing sufficient information from points in different distance ranges and reduces the model's learning capability. To alleviate this problem, we propose a new Polar Cylinder Balanced Random Sampling method that enables the downsampled point clouds to maintain a more balanced distribution and improve the segmentation performance under different spatial distributions. In addition, a sampling consistency loss is introduced to further improve the segmentation performance and reduce the model's variance under different sampling methods. Extensive experiments confirm that our approach produces excellent performance on both SemanticKITTI and SemanticPOSS benchmarks, achieving a 2.8% and 4.0% improvement, respectively. The source code is available at https://github.com/huixiancheng/PCB-RandNet.
abstract_zh: 大规模激光雷达点云的快速高效语义分割是自动驾驶的一个基本问题。为了实现这一目标，现有的基于点的方法主要选择采用随机采样策略来处理大规模点云。然而，我们的定量和定性研究发现，随机采样可能不太适合自动驾驶场景，因为LiDAR点在空间中遵循不均匀甚至长尾的分布，这使得模型无法从不同距离范围的点捕获足够的信息，并降低模型的学习能力。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新的极柱平衡随机采样方法，使下采样的点云能够保持更平衡的分布，并提高不同空间分布下的分割性能。此外，引入了采样一致性损失，以进一步提高分割性能并减少模型在不同采样方法下的方差。大量实验证实，我们的方法在 SemanticKITTI 和 SemanticPOSS 基准测试中均表现出色，分别提高了 2.8% 和 4.0%。源代码可在 https://github.com/huixian Cheng/PCB-RandNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的随机采样方法PCB-RandNet，用于提升自动驾驶场景中LiDAR点云语义分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于随机采样的点云处理方法在自动驾驶场景中表现不佳，因为LiDAR点云在空间分布上存在不均衡或长尾特性，导致模型难以学习不同距离范围的信息。
AI.method: 提出极坐标圆柱平衡随机采样方法（Polar Cylinder Balanced Random Sampling），使下采样点云保持更均衡分布，并引入采样一致性损失函数以减少不同采样方法下的模型方差。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和SemanticPOSS基准测试中分别取得2.8%和4.0%的性能提升，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效解决了LiDAR点云空间分布不均衡问题，显著提升了语义分割性能，验证了其在自动驾驶场景中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的随机采样方法PCB-RandNet，用于提升自动驾驶场景中LiDAR点云语义分割的性能。

search_text: PCB-RandNet: Rethinking Random Sampling for LIDAR Semantic Segmentation in Autonomous Driving Scene PCB-RandNet：重新思考自动驾驶场景中激光雷达语义分割的随机采样 Fast and efficient semantic segmentation of large-scale LiDAR point clouds is a fundamental problem in autonomous driving. To achieve this goal, the existing point-based methods mainly choose to adopt Random Sampling strategy to process large-scale point clouds. However, our quantative and qualitative studies have found that Random Sampling may be less suitable for the autonomous driving scenario, since the LiDAR points follow an uneven or even long-tailed distribution across the space, which prevents the model from capturing sufficient information from points in different distance ranges and reduces the model's learning capability. To alleviate this problem, we propose a new Polar Cylinder Balanced Random Sampling method that enables the downsampled point clouds to maintain a more balanced distribution and improve the segmentation performance under different spatial distributions. In addition, a sampling consistency loss is introduced to further improve the segmentation performance and reduce the model's variance under different sampling methods. Extensive experiments confirm that our approach produces excellent performance on both SemanticKITTI and SemanticPOSS benchmarks, achieving a 2.8% and 4.0% improvement, respectively. The source code is available at https://github.com/huixiancheng/PCB-RandNet. 大规模激光雷达点云的快速高效语义分割是自动驾驶的一个基本问题。为了实现这一目标，现有的基于点的方法主要选择采用随机采样策略来处理大规模点云。然而，我们的定量和定性研究发现，随机采样可能不太适合自动驾驶场景，因为LiDAR点在空间中遵循不均匀甚至长尾的分布，这使得模型无法从不同距离范围的点捕获足够的信息，并降低模型的学习能力。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新的极柱平衡随机采样方法，使下采样的点云能够保持更平衡的分布，并提高不同空间分布下的分割性能。此外，引入了采样一致性损失，以进一步提高分割性能并减少模型在不同采样方法下的方差。大量实验证实，我们的方法在 SemanticKITTI 和 SemanticPOSS 基准测试中均表现出色，分别提高了 2.8% 和 4.0%。源代码可在 https://github.com/huixian Cheng/PCB-RandNet 获取。 本文提出了一种改进的随机采样方法PCB-RandNet，用于提升自动驾驶场景中LiDAR点云语义分割的性能。 XianFeng Han,Huixian Cheng,Hang Jiang,Dehong He,Guoqiang Xiao cs.CV

authors_text: Gustavo Cunha Lacerda,Raimundo Claudio da Silva Vasconcelos
title: A Machine Learning Approach for DeepFake Detection
title_zh: 用于 DeepFake 检测的机器学习方法
comment: 4 pages, accepted for presentation at the SIBGRAPI 2022
comments: 4 pages, accepted for presentation at the SIBGRAPI 2022
abstract: With the spread of DeepFake techniques, this technology has become quite accessible and good enough that there is concern about its malicious use. Faced with this problem, detecting forged faces is of utmost importance to ensure security and avoid socio-political problems, both on a global and private scale. This paper presents a solution for the detection of DeepFakes using convolution neural networks and a dataset developed for this purpose - Celeb-DF. The results show that, with an overall accuracy of 95% in the classification of these images, the proposed model is close to what exists in the state of the art with the possibility of adjustment for better results in the manipulation techniques that arise in the future.
summary: With the spread of DeepFake techniques, this technology has become quite accessible and good enough that there is concern about its malicious use. Faced with this problem, detecting forged faces is of utmost importance to ensure security and avoid socio-political problems, both on a global and private scale. This paper presents a solution for the detection of DeepFakes using convolution neural networks and a dataset developed for this purpose - Celeb-DF. The results show that, with an overall accuracy of 95% in the classification of these images, the proposed model is close to what exists in the state of the art with the possibility of adjustment for better results in the manipulation techniques that arise in the future.
abstract_zh: 随着 DeepFake 技术的传播，这项技术已经变得非常容易获得并且足够好，以至于人们担心它会被恶意使用。面对这个问题，检测伪造的面孔对于确保全球和私人范围内的安全并避免社会政治问题至关重要。本文提出了一种使用卷积神经网络检测 DeepFakes 的解决方案以及为此目的开发的数据集 - Celeb-DF。结果表明，这些图像分类的总体准确率为 95%，所提出的模型接近现有技术水平，并且有可能在未来出现的操纵技术中进行调整以获得更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机器学习的深度伪造（DeepFake）检测方法，利用卷积神经网络和Celeb-DF数据集实现高准确率的伪造人脸分类。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造技术的普及引发安全与社会政治风险，亟需有效检测手段以防止恶意使用。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络构建检测模型，并基于专门开发的Celeb-DF数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 模型在图像分类任务中达到95%的总体准确率，接近当前先进水平且具备应对未来伪造技术调整的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的检测方法在现有技术中表现优异，未来可通过优化模型适应新型深度伪造技术。

authors_text: Swapnil Parekh,Devansh Shah,Pratyush Shukla
title: Attacking Compressed Vision Transformers
title_zh: 攻击压缩视觉变压器
abstract: Vision Transformers are increasingly embedded in industrial systems due to their superior performance, but their memory and power requirements make deploying them to edge devices a challenging task. Hence, model compression techniques are now widely used to deploy models on edge devices as they decrease the resource requirements and make model inference very fast and efficient. But their reliability and robustness from a security perspective is another major issue in safety-critical applications. Adversarial attacks are like optical illusions for ML algorithms and they can severely impact the accuracy and reliability of models. In this work we investigate the transferability of adversarial samples across the SOTA Vision Transformer models across 3 SOTA compressed versions and infer the effects different compression techniques have on adversarial attacks.
summary: Vision Transformers are increasingly embedded in industrial systems due to their superior performance, but their memory and power requirements make deploying them to edge devices a challenging task. Hence, model compression techniques are now widely used to deploy models on edge devices as they decrease the resource requirements and make model inference very fast and efficient. But their reliability and robustness from a security perspective is another major issue in safety-critical applications. Adversarial attacks are like optical illusions for ML algorithms and they can severely impact the accuracy and reliability of models. In this work we investigate the transferability of adversarial samples across the SOTA Vision Transformer models across 3 SOTA compressed versions and infer the effects different compression techniques have on adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 由于其卓越的性能，Vision Transformer 越来越多地嵌入到工业系统中，但其内存和功耗要求使得将它们部署到边缘设备成为一项具有挑战性的任务。因此，模型压缩技术现在被广泛用于在边缘设备上部署模型，因为它们减少了资源需求并使模型推理变得非常快速和高效。但从安全角度来看，它们的可靠性和稳健性是安全关键型应用中的另一个主要问题。对抗性攻击就像机器学习算法的视错觉，它们会严重影响模型的准确性和可靠性。在这项工作中，我们研究了跨 3 个 SOTA 压缩版本的 SOTA Vision Transformer 模型的对抗性样本的可转移性，并推断了不同压缩技术对对抗性攻击的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了对抗样本在压缩后的视觉Transformer模型中的可迁移性，并分析不同压缩技术对对抗攻击的影响。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer虽性能优越，但因内存和功耗限制需通过压缩部署到边缘设备，而压缩后的模型在安全性方面存在隐患，需评估其对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 在三种最先进的压缩版本的视觉Transformer模型上测试对抗样本的可迁移性，分析不同压缩技术对攻击效果的影响。
AI.result: 发现对抗样本在压缩模型间具有较高可迁移性，且不同压缩技术会显著影响模型的抗攻击能力。
AI.conclusion: 模型压缩可能引入新的安全风险，需在压缩过程中考虑对抗鲁棒性，未来需进一步研究安全与效率的平衡方法。

authors_text: Jingchao Peng,Haitao Zhao,Kaijie Zhao,Zhongze Wang,Lujian Yao
title: CourtNet for Infrared Small-Target Detection
title_zh: 用于红外小目标检测的 CourtNet
abstract: Infrared small-target detection (ISTD) is an important computer vision task. ISTD aims at separating small targets from complex background clutter. The infrared radiation decays over distances, making the targets highly dim and prone to confusion with the background clutter, which makes the detector challenging to balance the precision and recall rate. To deal with this difficulty, this paper proposes a neural-network-based ISTD method called CourtNet, which has three sub-networks: the prosecution network is designed for improving the recall rate; the defendant network is devoted to increasing the precision rate; the jury network weights their results to adaptively balance the precision and recall rate. Furthermore, the prosecution network utilizes a densely connected transformer structure, which can prevent small targets from disappearing in the network forward propagation. In addition, a fine-grained attention module is adopted to accurately locate the small targets. Experimental results show that CourtNet achieves the best F1-score on the two ISTD datasets, MFIRST (0.62) and SIRST (0.73).
summary: Infrared small-target detection (ISTD) is an important computer vision task. ISTD aims at separating small targets from complex background clutter. The infrared radiation decays over distances, making the targets highly dim and prone to confusion with the background clutter, which makes the detector challenging to balance the precision and recall rate. To deal with this difficulty, this paper proposes a neural-network-based ISTD method called CourtNet, which has three sub-networks: the prosecution network is designed for improving the recall rate; the defendant network is devoted to increasing the precision rate; the jury network weights their results to adaptively balance the precision and recall rate. Furthermore, the prosecution network utilizes a densely connected transformer structure, which can prevent small targets from disappearing in the network forward propagation. In addition, a fine-grained attention module is adopted to accurately locate the small targets. Experimental results show that CourtNet achieves the best F1-score on the two ISTD datasets, MFIRST (0.62) and SIRST (0.73).
abstract_zh: 红外小目标检测（ISTD）是一项重要的计算机视觉任务。 ISTD 旨在将小目标从复杂的背景杂波中分离出来。红外辐射随着距离的增加而衰减，使目标变得非常暗淡，并且容易与背景杂波混淆，这使得探测器难以平衡精度和召回率。为了解决这个困难，本文提出了一种基于神经网络的 ISTD 方法，称为 CourtNet，该方法具有三个子网络：起诉网络旨在提高召回率；被告网络致力于提高准确率；陪审团网络对结果进行加权，以自适应地平衡精确度和召回率。此外，起诉网络采用密集连接的变压器结构，可以防止小目标在网络前向传播中消失。此外，采用细粒度的注意力模块来准确定位小目标。实验结果表明，CourtNet 在两个 ISTD 数据集 MFIRST (0.62) 和 SIRST (0.73) 上取得了最佳 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CourtNet的神经网络方法，用于解决红外小目标检测（ISTD）中精度与召回率难以平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 红外小目标因辐射衰减易与背景混淆，现有检测方法难以兼顾精度与召回率，需设计新型网络结构实现动态平衡。
AI.method: CourtNet包含三个子网络：检控网络（提升召回率）采用密集连接的Transformer结构防止小目标消失，并引入细粒度注意力模块精确定位；辩方网络（提升精度）优化检测阈值；陪审团网络动态加权平衡两者的输出。
AI.result: 在MFIRST和SIRST两个ISTD数据集上，CourtNet分别取得F1-score 0.62和0.73，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CourtNet通过多网络协同机制有效解决了红外小目标检测中精度与召回率的矛盾，为ISTD任务提供了新思路。

search_text: CourtNet for Infrared Small-Target Detection 用于红外小目标检测的 CourtNet Infrared small-target detection (ISTD) is an important computer vision task. ISTD aims at separating small targets from complex background clutter. The infrared radiation decays over distances, making the targets highly dim and prone to confusion with the background clutter, which makes the detector challenging to balance the precision and recall rate. To deal with this difficulty, this paper proposes a neural-network-based ISTD method called CourtNet, which has three sub-networks: the prosecution network is designed for improving the recall rate; the defendant network is devoted to increasing the precision rate; the jury network weights their results to adaptively balance the precision and recall rate. Furthermore, the prosecution network utilizes a densely connected transformer structure, which can prevent small targets from disappearing in the network forward propagation. In addition, a fine-grained attention module is adopted to accurately locate the small targets. Experimental results show that CourtNet achieves the best F1-score on the two ISTD datasets, MFIRST (0.62) and SIRST (0.73). 红外小目标检测（ISTD）是一项重要的计算机视觉任务。 ISTD 旨在将小目标从复杂的背景杂波中分离出来。红外辐射随着距离的增加而衰减，使目标变得非常暗淡，并且容易与背景杂波混淆，这使得探测器难以平衡精度和召回率。为了解决这个困难，本文提出了一种基于神经网络的 ISTD 方法，称为 CourtNet，该方法具有三个子网络：起诉网络旨在提高召回率；被告网络致力于提高准确率；陪审团网络对结果进行加权，以自适应地平衡精确度和召回率。此外，起诉网络采用密集连接的变压器结构，可以防止小目标在网络前向传播中消失。此外，采用细粒度的注意力模块来准确定位小目标。实验结果表明，CourtNet 在两个 ISTD 数据集 MFIRST (0.62) 和 SIRST (0.73) 上取得了最佳 F1 分数。 本文提出一种名为CourtNet的神经网络方法，用于解决红外小目标检测（ISTD）中精度与召回率难以平衡的问题。 Jingchao Peng,Haitao Zhao,Kaijie Zhao,Zhongze Wang,Lujian Yao cs.CV

authors_text: Xiu-Shen Wei,He-Yang Xu,Faen Zhang,Yuxin Peng,Wei Zhou
title: An Embarrassingly Simple Approach to Semi-Supervised Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: 半监督小样本学习的一种极其简单的方法
abstract: Semi-supervised few-shot learning consists in training a classifier to adapt to new tasks with limited labeled data and a fixed quantity of unlabeled data. Many sophisticated methods have been developed to address the challenges this problem comprises. In this paper, we propose a simple but quite effective approach to predict accurate negative pseudo-labels of unlabeled data from an indirect learning perspective, and then augment the extremely label-constrained support set in few-shot classification tasks. Our approach can be implemented in just few lines of code by only using off-the-shelf operations, yet it is able to outperform state-of-the-art methods on four benchmark datasets.
summary: Semi-supervised few-shot learning consists in training a classifier to adapt to new tasks with limited labeled data and a fixed quantity of unlabeled data. Many sophisticated methods have been developed to address the challenges this problem comprises. In this paper, we propose a simple but quite effective approach to predict accurate negative pseudo-labels of unlabeled data from an indirect learning perspective, and then augment the extremely label-constrained support set in few-shot classification tasks. Our approach can be implemented in just few lines of code by only using off-the-shelf operations, yet it is able to outperform state-of-the-art methods on four benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 半监督小样本学习包括训练分类器以适应具有有限标记数据和固定数量的未标记数据的新任务。已经开发了许多复杂的方法来解决这个问题所带来的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但非常有效的方法，从间接学习的角度预测未标记数据的准确负伪标签，然后在少样本分类任务中增强极度标签约束的支持集。我们的方法只需使用现成的操作，只需几行代码即可实现，但它能够在四个基准数据集上超越最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简单的半监督少样本学习方法，通过预测未标记数据的负伪标签来增强标签受限的支持集，从而提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督少样本学习方法复杂且效果有限，本文旨在开发一种简单但高效的方法以解决标签稀缺问题。
AI.method: 从间接学习视角生成负伪标签，通过现成操作扩充支持集，仅需少量代码实现。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 简单方法在半监督少样本学习中表现优异，为实际应用提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Chenlin Meng,Linqi Zhou,Kristy Choi,Tri Dao,Stefano Ermon
title: ButterflyFlow: Building Invertible Layers with Butterfly Matrices
title_zh: ButterflyFlow：使用蝴蝶矩阵构建可逆层
abstract: Normalizing flows model complex probability distributions using maps obtained by composing invertible layers. Special linear layers such as masked and 1x1 convolutions play a key role in existing architectures because they increase expressive power while having tractable Jacobians and inverses. We propose a new family of invertible linear layers based on butterfly layers, which are known to theoretically capture complex linear structures including permutations and periodicity, yet can be inverted efficiently. This representational power is a key advantage of our approach, as such structures are common in many real-world datasets. Based on our invertible butterfly layers, we construct a new class of normalizing flow models called ButterflyFlow. Empirically, we demonstrate that ButterflyFlows not only achieve strong density estimation results on natural images such as MNIST, CIFAR-10, and ImageNet 32x32, but also obtain significantly better log-likelihoods on structured datasets such as galaxy images and MIMIC-III patient cohorts -- all while being more efficient in terms of memory and computation than relevant baselines.
summary: Normalizing flows model complex probability distributions using maps obtained by composing invertible layers. Special linear layers such as masked and 1x1 convolutions play a key role in existing architectures because they increase expressive power while having tractable Jacobians and inverses. We propose a new family of invertible linear layers based on butterfly layers, which are known to theoretically capture complex linear structures including permutations and periodicity, yet can be inverted efficiently. This representational power is a key advantage of our approach, as such structures are common in many real-world datasets. Based on our invertible butterfly layers, we construct a new class of normalizing flow models called ButterflyFlow. Empirically, we demonstrate that ButterflyFlows not only achieve strong density estimation results on natural images such as MNIST, CIFAR-10, and ImageNet 32x32, but also obtain significantly better log-likelihoods on structured datasets such as galaxy images and MIMIC-III patient cohorts -- all while being more efficient in terms of memory and computation than relevant baselines.
abstract_zh: 归一化流使用通过组合可逆层获得的图对复杂的概率分布进行建模。特殊线性层（例如掩模卷积和 1x1 卷积）在现有架构中发挥着关键作用，因为它们在具有易于处理的雅可比行列式和逆矩阵的同时增强了表达能力。我们提出了一种基于蝶形层的新的可逆线性层家族，理论上可以捕获包括排列和周期性在内的复杂线性结构，但可以有效地反转。这种表征能力是我们方法的一个关键优势，因为这种结构在许多现实世界的数据集中很常见。基于可逆蝴蝶层，我们构建了一类新的标准化流模型，称为 ButterflyFlow。根据经验，我们证明 ButterflyFlows 不仅在 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 32​​x32 等自然图像上实现了强大的密度估计结果，而且在星系图像和 MIMIC-III 患者队列等结构化数据集上获得了明显更好的对数似然 - 同时在内存和计算方面比相关基线更高效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于蝶形矩阵的可逆线性层，用于构建更高效的归一化流模型，称为ButterflyFlow。
AI.motivation: 现有的归一化流模型依赖于可逆层，如掩码卷积和1x1卷积，这些层虽然具有可计算的雅可比行列式和逆，但难以捕捉复杂的线性结构。因此，需要一种更高效且表达能力更强的可逆层。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于蝶形矩阵的新可逆线性层，该层能够高效捕捉复杂的线性结构，如置换和周期性。基于此，构建了新的归一化流模型ButterflyFlow。
AI.result: 实验表明，ButterflyFlow在自然图像（如MNIST、CIFAR-10和ImageNet 32x32）和结构化数据集（如星系图像和MIMIC-III患者队列）上均取得了优异的密度估计结果和更高的对数似然值，同时在内存和计算效率上优于相关基线。
AI.conclusion: ButterflyFlow通过引入蝶形矩阵可逆层，有效提升了归一化流模型的表达能力和计算效率，为复杂数据建模提供了新的方法。

We propose a new family of invertible linear layers based on butterfly layers, which are known to theoretically capture complex linear structures including permutations and periodicity, yet can be inverted efficiently. This representational power is a key advantage of our approach, as such structures are common in many real-world datasets. Based on our invertible butterfly layers, we construct a new class of normalizing flow models called ButterflyFlow. Empirically, we demonstrate that ButterflyFlows not only achieve strong density estimation results on natural images such as MNIST, CIFAR-10, and ImageNet 32x32, but also obtain significantly better log-likelihoods on structured datasets such as galaxy images and MIMIC-III patient cohorts -- all while being more efficient in terms of memory and computation than relevant baselines. 归一化流使用通过组合可逆层获得的图对复杂的概率分布进行建模。特殊线性层（例如掩模卷积和 1x1 卷积）在现有架构中发挥着关键作用，因为它们在具有易于处理的雅可比行列式和逆矩阵的同时增强了表达能力。我们提出了一种基于蝶形层的新的可逆线性层家族，理论上可以捕获包括排列和周期性在内的复杂线性结构，但可以有效地反转。这种表征能力是我们方法的一个关键优势，因为这种结构在许多现实世界的数据集中很常见。基于可逆蝴蝶层，我们构建了一类新的标准化流模型，称为 ButterflyFlow。根据经验，我们证明 ButterflyFlows 不仅在 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 32​​x32 等自然图像上实现了强大的密度估计结果，而且在星系图像和 MIMIC-III 患者队列等结构化数据集上获得了明显更好的对数似然 - 同时在内存和计算方面比相关基线更高效。 本文提出了一种基于蝶形矩阵的可逆线性层，用于构建更高效的归一化流模型，称为ButterflyFlow。 Chenlin Meng,Linqi Zhou,Kristy Choi,Tri Dao,Stefano Ermon cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Manoosh Samiei,James J. Clark
title: Target Features Affect Visual Search, A Study of Eye Fixations
title_zh: 目标特征影响视觉搜索，眼睛注视的研究
abstract: Visual Search is referred to the task of finding a target object among a set of distracting objects in a visual display. In this paper, based on an independent analysis of the COCO-Search18 dataset, we investigate how the performance of human participants during visual search is affected by different parameters such as the size and eccentricity of the target object. We also study the correlation between the error rate of participants and search performance. Our studies show that a bigger and more eccentric target is found faster with fewer number of fixations. Our code for the graphics are publicly available at https://github.com/ManooshSamiei/COCOSearch18_Analysis.
summary: Visual Search is referred to the task of finding a target object among a set of distracting objects in a visual display. In this paper, based on an independent analysis of the COCO-Search18 dataset, we investigate how the performance of human participants during visual search is affected by different parameters such as the size and eccentricity of the target object. We also study the correlation between the error rate of participants and search performance. Our studies show that a bigger and more eccentric target is found faster with fewer number of fixations. Our code for the graphics are publicly available at https://github.com/ManooshSamiei/COCOSearch18_Analysis.
abstract_zh: 视觉搜索是指在视觉显示中的一组分散注意力的对象中查找目标对象的任务。在本文中，基于对 COCO-Search18 数据集的独立分析，我们研究了目标对象的大小和偏心率等不同参数如何影响人类参与者在视觉搜索过程中的表现。我们还研究了参与者的错误率和搜索性能之间的相关性。我们的研究表明，用更少的注视次数可以更快地找到更大、更偏心的目标。我们的图形代码可在 https://github.com/ManooshSamiei/COCOSearch18_Analysis 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 研究目标物体的大小和偏心度如何影响人类视觉搜索表现及错误率与搜索性能的关系
AI.motivation: 探讨目标物体特征对视觉搜索效率的影响，以理解人类视觉搜索机制并优化相关应用设计
AI.method: 基于COCO-Search18数据集，分析目标物体大小和偏心度对搜索表现的影响，并研究错误率与搜索性能的相关性
AI.result: 更大的目标和更偏心的目标被更快找到，且所需眼动次数更少
AI.conclusion: 目标特征显著影响视觉搜索效率，为优化视觉搜索任务设计提供理论依据

authors_text: Dongjin Guo,Xiaoming Su,Jiatai Wang,Limin Liu,Zhiyong Pei,Zhiwei Xu
title: Clustering-Induced Generative Incomplete Image-Text Clustering (CIGIT-C)
title_zh: 聚类诱导的生成不完整图像文本聚类 (CIGIT-C)
abstract: The target of image-text clustering (ITC) is to find correct clusters by integrating complementary and consistent information of multi-modalities for these heterogeneous samples. However, the majority of current studies analyse ITC on the ideal premise that the samples in every modality are complete. This presumption, however, is not always valid in real-world situations. The missing data issue degenerates the image-text feature learning performance and will finally affect the generalization abilities in ITC tasks. Although a series of methods have been proposed to address this incomplete image text clustering issue (IITC), the following problems still exist: 1) most existing methods hardly consider the distinct gap between heterogeneous feature domains. 2) For missing data, the representations generated by existing methods are rarely guaranteed to suit clustering tasks. 3) Existing methods do not tap into the latent connections both inter and intra modalities. In this paper, we propose a Clustering-Induced Generative Incomplete Image-Text Clustering(CIGIT-C) network to address the challenges above. More specifically, we first use modality-specific encoders to map original features to more distinctive subspaces. The latent connections between intra and inter-modalities are thoroughly explored by using the adversarial generating network to produce one modality conditional on the other modality. Finally, we update the corresponding modalityspecific encoders using two KL divergence losses. Experiment results on public image-text datasets demonstrated that the suggested method outperforms and is more effective in the IITC job.
summary: The target of image-text clustering (ITC) is to find correct clusters by integrating complementary and consistent information of multi-modalities for these heterogeneous samples. However, the majority of current studies analyse ITC on the ideal premise that the samples in every modality are complete. This presumption, however, is not always valid in real-world situations. The missing data issue degenerates the image-text feature learning performance and will finally affect the generalization abilities in ITC tasks. Although a series of methods have been proposed to address this incomplete image text clustering issue (IITC), the following problems still exist: 1) most existing methods hardly consider the distinct gap between heterogeneous feature domains. 2) For missing data, the representations generated by existing methods are rarely guaranteed to suit clustering tasks. 3) Existing methods do not tap into the latent connections both inter and intra modalities. In this paper, we propose a Clustering-Induced Generative Incomplete Image-Text Clustering(CIGIT-C) network to address the challenges above. More specifically, we first use modality-specific encoders to map original features to more distinctive subspaces. The latent connections between intra and inter-modalities are thoroughly explored by using the adversarial generating network to produce one modality conditional on the other modality. Finally, we update the corresponding modalityspecific encoders using two KL divergence losses. Experiment results on public image-text datasets demonstrated that the suggested method outperforms and is more effective in the IITC job.
abstract_zh: 图文聚类（ITC）的目标是通过整合这些异构样本的多模态互补且一致的信息来找到正确的聚类。然而，目前大多数研究分析 ITC 的理想前提是每种模态的样本都是完整的。然而，这种假设在现实世界中并不总是有效。缺失数据问题会降低图像文本特征学习性能，最终影响ITC任务中的泛化能力。尽管已经提出了一系列方法来解决不完整的图像文本聚类问题（IITC），但仍然存在以下问题：1）大多数现有方法几乎没有考虑异构特征域之间的明显差距。 2）对于缺失数据，现有方法生成的表示很少能保证适合聚类任务。 3）现有方法没有利用模态间和模态内的潜在连接。在本文中，我们提出了一种聚类诱导的生成不完整图像文本聚类（CIGIT-C）网络来​​解决上述挑战。更具体地说，我们首先使用特定于模态的编码器将原始特征映射到更独特的子空间。通过使用对抗性生成网络来产生一种以另一种模态为条件的模态，从而彻底探索模态内和模态间之间的潜在联系。最后，我们使用两个 KL 散度损失更新相应的模态特定编码器。在公共图像文本数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在 IITC 工作中表现优于并且更有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CIGIT-C的聚类诱导生成不完整图像-文本聚类方法，旨在解决多模态数据缺失情况下的图像-文本聚类问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像-文本聚类方法假设多模态数据完整，但实际场景中数据缺失会损害特征学习性能，且现有方法未能有效处理模态间差异、缺失数据表示及模态间潜在关联。
AI.method: 通过模态特定编码器将原始特征映射到区分性子空间，利用对抗生成网络探索模态间潜在联系，并采用两种KL散度损失更新编码器以生成适合聚类任务的表示。
AI.result: 在公开图像-文本数据集上的实验表明，CIGIT-C方法在不完整图像-文本聚类任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CIGIT-C通过建模模态间潜在关联及优化缺失数据表示，有效提升了不完整多模态数据聚类性能。

authors_text: Zhifeng Wang,Zhenghui Wang,Chunyan Zeng,Yan Yu,Xiangkui Wan
title: Image Compressed Sensing with Multi-scale Dilated Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 多尺度扩张卷积神经网络的图像压缩感知
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) based Compressed Sensing (CS) has been applied for better performance of image reconstruction than traditional CS methods. However, most existing DL methods utilize the block-by-block measurement and each measurement block is restored separately, which introduces harmful blocking effects for reconstruction. Furthermore, the neuronal receptive fields of those methods are designed to be the same size in each layer, which can only collect single-scale spatial information and has a negative impact on the reconstruction process. This paper proposes a novel framework named Multi-scale Dilated Convolution Neural Network (MsDCNN) for CS measurement and reconstruction. During the measurement period, we directly obtain all measurements from a trained measurement network, which employs fully convolutional structures and is jointly trained with the reconstruction network from the input image. It needn't be cut into blocks, which effectively avoids the block effect. During the reconstruction period, we propose the Multi-scale Feature Extraction (MFE) architecture to imitate the human visual system to capture multi-scale features from the same feature map, which enhances the image feature extraction ability of the framework and improves the performance of image reconstruction. In the MFE, there are multiple parallel convolution channels to obtain multi-scale feature information. Then the multi-scale features information is fused and the original image is reconstructed with high quality. Our experimental results show that the proposed method performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods in terms of PSNR and SSIM.
summary: Deep Learning (DL) based Compressed Sensing (CS) has been applied for better performance of image reconstruction than traditional CS methods. However, most existing DL methods utilize the block-by-block measurement and each measurement block is restored separately, which introduces harmful blocking effects for reconstruction. Furthermore, the neuronal receptive fields of those methods are designed to be the same size in each layer, which can only collect single-scale spatial information and has a negative impact on the reconstruction process. This paper proposes a novel framework named Multi-scale Dilated Convolution Neural Network (MsDCNN) for CS measurement and reconstruction. During the measurement period, we directly obtain all measurements from a trained measurement network, which employs fully convolutional structures and is jointly trained with the reconstruction network from the input image. It needn't be cut into blocks, which effectively avoids the block effect. During the reconstruction period, we propose the Multi-scale Feature Extraction (MFE) architecture to imitate the human visual system to capture multi-scale features from the same feature map, which enhances the image feature extraction ability of the framework and improves the performance of image reconstruction. In the MFE, there are multiple parallel convolution channels to obtain multi-scale feature information. Then the multi-scale features information is fused and the original image is reconstructed with high quality. Our experimental results show that the proposed method performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods in terms of PSNR and SSIM.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习 (DL) 的压缩感知 (CS) 已被应用于比传统 CS 方法更好的图像重建性能。然而，大多数现有的深度学习方法利用逐块测量，并且每个测量块单独恢复，这给重建引入了有害的块效应。此外，这些方法的神经元感受野被设计为每层的大小相同，只能收集单尺度的空间信息，对重建过程产生负面影响。本文提出了一种名为多尺度扩张卷积神经网络（MsDCNN）的新型框架，用于 CS 测量和重建。在测量期间，我们直接从经过训练的测量网络获得所有测量结果，该网络采用全卷积结构，并与输入图像的重建网络联合训练。无需切割成块，有效避免了块效应。在重建期间，我们提出了多尺度特征提取（MFE）架构来模仿人类视觉系统从同一特征图中捕获多尺度特征，增强了框架的图像特征提取能力，提高了图像重建的性能。在MFE中，有多个并行的卷积通道来获取多尺度的特征信息。然后融合多尺度特征信息，高质量地重建原始图像。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在 PSNR 和 SSIM 方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度扩张卷积神经网络（MsDCNN）的图像压缩感知方法，旨在解决传统深度学习压缩感知中的块效应和单尺度特征提取问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习压缩感知方法采用分块测量和重建，导致块效应且单尺度感受野限制了特征提取能力，影响重建质量。
AI.method: 设计端到端全卷积测量网络直接获取全局测量值，联合训练重建网络；提出多尺度特征提取（MFE）架构，通过并行卷积通道融合多尺度特征实现高质量图像重建。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在PSNR和SSIM指标上优于现有最先进方法，验证了多尺度特征融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MsDCNN通过全局测量和多尺度特征提取有效解决了块效应问题，显著提升了图像压缩感知的重建性能。

search_text: Image Compressed Sensing with Multi-scale Dilated Convolutional Neural Network 多尺度扩张卷积神经网络的图像压缩感知 Deep Learning (DL) based Compressed Sensing (CS) has been applied for better performance of image reconstruction than traditional CS methods. However, most existing DL methods utilize the block-by-block measurement and each measurement block is restored separately, which introduces harmful blocking effects for reconstruction. Furthermore, the neuronal receptive fields of those methods are designed to be the same size in each layer, which can only collect single-scale spatial information and has a negative impact on the reconstruction process. This paper proposes a novel framework named Multi-scale Dilated Convolution Neural Network (MsDCNN) for CS measurement and reconstruction. During the measurement period, we directly obtain all measurements from a trained measurement network, which employs fully convolutional structures and is jointly trained with the reconstruction network from the input image. It needn't be cut into blocks, which effectively avoids the block effect. During the reconstruction period, we propose the Multi-scale Feature Extraction (MFE) architecture to imitate the human visual system to capture multi-scale features from the same feature map, which enhances the image feature extraction ability of the framework and improves the performance of image reconstruction. In the MFE, there are multiple parallel convolution channels to obtain multi-scale feature information. Then the multi-scale features information is fused and the original image is reconstructed with high quality. Our experimental results show that the proposed method performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods in terms of PSNR and SSIM. 基于深度学习 (DL) 的压缩感知 (CS) 已被应用于比传统 CS 方法更好的图像重建性能。然而，大多数现有的深度学习方法利用逐块测量，并且每个测量块单独恢复，这给重建引入了有害的块效应。此外，这些方法的神经元感受野被设计为每层的大小相同，只能收集单尺度的空间信息，对重建过程产生负面影响。本文提出了一种名为多尺度扩张卷积神经网络（MsDCNN）的新型框架，用于 CS 测量和重建。在测量期间，我们直接从经过训练的测量网络获得所有测量结果，该网络采用全卷积结构，并与输入图像的重建网络联合训练。无需切割成块，有效避免了块效应。在重建期间，我们提出了多尺度特征提取（MFE）架构来模仿人类视觉系统从同一特征图中捕获多尺度特征，增强了框架的图像特征提取能力，提高了图像重建的性能。在MFE中，有多个并行的卷积通道来获取多尺度的特征信息。然后融合多尺度特征信息，高质量地重建原始图像。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在 PSNR 和 SSIM 方面优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种基于多尺度扩张卷积神经网络（MsDCNN）的图像压缩感知方法，旨在解决传统深度学习压缩感知中的块效应和单尺度特征提取问题。 Zhifeng Wang,Zhenghui Wang,Chunyan Zeng,Yan Yu,Xiangkui Wan eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Junfeng Chen,Fuqin Deng,Yuan Gao,Junjie Hu,Xiyue Guo,Guanqi Liang,Tin Lun Lam
title: MultiRoboLearn: An open-source Framework for Multi-robot Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: MultiRoboLearn：多机器人深度强化学习的开源框架
abstract: It is well known that it is difficult to have a reliable and robust framework to link multi-agent deep reinforcement learning algorithms with practical multi-robot applications. To fill this gap, we propose and build an open-source framework for multi-robot systems called MultiRoboLearn1. This framework builds a unified setup of simulation and real-world applications. It aims to provide standard, easy-to-use simulated scenarios that can also be easily deployed to real-world multi-robot environments. Also, the framework provides researchers with a benchmark system for comparing the performance of different reinforcement learning algorithms. We demonstrate the generality, scalability, and capability of the framework with two real-world scenarios2 using different types of multi-agent deep reinforcement learning algorithms in discrete and continuous action spaces.
summary: It is well known that it is difficult to have a reliable and robust framework to link multi-agent deep reinforcement learning algorithms with practical multi-robot applications. To fill this gap, we propose and build an open-source framework for multi-robot systems called MultiRoboLearn1. This framework builds a unified setup of simulation and real-world applications. It aims to provide standard, easy-to-use simulated scenarios that can also be easily deployed to real-world multi-robot environments. Also, the framework provides researchers with a benchmark system for comparing the performance of different reinforcement learning algorithms. We demonstrate the generality, scalability, and capability of the framework with two real-world scenarios2 using different types of multi-agent deep reinforcement learning algorithms in discrete and continuous action spaces.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，很难有一个可靠且鲁棒的框架将多智能体深度强化学习算法与实际的多机器人应用联系起来。为了填补这一空白，我们提出并构建了一个名为 MultiRoboLearn1 的多机器人系统开源框架。该框架构建了模拟和现实应用程序的统一设置。它旨在提供标准、易于使用的模拟场景，这些场景也可以轻松部署到现实世界的多机器人环境中。此外，该框架还为研究人员提供了一个基准系统，用于比较不同强化学习算法的性能。我们通过在离散和连续动作空间中使用不同类型的多智能体深度强化学习算法的两个现实场景2展示了该框架的通用性、可扩展性和功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个开源框架MultiRoboLearn，旨在连接多智能体深度强化学习算法与实际多机器人应用，提供统一的仿真与现实环境部署方案，并作为算法性能比较的基准系统。
AI.motivation: 现有框架难以可靠地链接多智能体深度强化学习算法与实际多机器人应用，缺乏标准化、易用的仿真场景及现实部署能力，亟需填补这一技术缺口。
AI.method: 构建支持仿真与现实统一设置的开源框架，包含标准化模拟场景、现实环境部署接口及多算法性能对比基准，通过离散和连续动作空间的多类型算法验证框架通用性。
AI.result: 通过两个真实场景实验，验证了框架在通用性、可扩展性及多算法适配能力上的有效性，展示了其在不同动作空间中的实际应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: MultiRoboLearn框架有效解决了多机器人系统与深度强化学习算法间的衔接问题，为后续研究提供了标准化工具，推动了该领域的实际应用发展。

search_text: MultiRoboLearn: An open-source Framework for Multi-robot Deep Reinforcement Learning MultiRoboLearn：多机器人深度强化学习的开源框架 It is well known that it is difficult to have a reliable and robust framework to link multi-agent deep reinforcement learning algorithms with practical multi-robot applications. To fill this gap, we propose and build an open-source framework for multi-robot systems called MultiRoboLearn1. This framework builds a unified setup of simulation and real-world applications. It aims to provide standard, easy-to-use simulated scenarios that can also be easily deployed to real-world multi-robot environments. Also, the framework provides researchers with a benchmark system for comparing the performance of different reinforcement learning algorithms. We demonstrate the generality, scalability, and capability of the framework with two real-world scenarios2 using different types of multi-agent deep reinforcement learning algorithms in discrete and continuous action spaces. 众所周知，很难有一个可靠且鲁棒的框架将多智能体深度强化学习算法与实际的多机器人应用联系起来。为了填补这一空白，我们提出并构建了一个名为 MultiRoboLearn1 的多机器人系统开源框架。该框架构建了模拟和现实应用程序的统一设置。它旨在提供标准、易于使用的模拟场景，这些场景也可以轻松部署到现实世界的多机器人环境中。此外，该框架还为研究人员提供了一个基准系统，用于比较不同强化学习算法的性能。我们通过在离散和连续动作空间中使用不同类型的多智能体深度强化学习算法的两个现实场景2展示了该框架的通用性、可扩展性和功能。 本文提出一个开源框架MultiRoboLearn，旨在连接多智能体深度强化学习算法与实际多机器人应用，提供统一的仿真与现实环境部署方案，并作为算法性能比较的基准系统。 Junfeng Chen,Fuqin Deng,Yuan Gao,Junjie Hu,Xiyue Guo,Guanqi Liang,Tin Lun Lam cs.RO

authors_text: Tianhao Wu,Boyang Li,Yihang Luo,Yingqian Wang,Chao Xiao,Ting Liu,Jungang Yang,Wei An,Yulan Guo
title: MTU-Net: Multi-level TransUNet for Space-based Infrared Tiny Ship Detection
title_zh: MTU-Net：用于天基红外微型船舶检测的多级TransUNet
abstract: Space-based infrared tiny ship detection aims at separating tiny ships from the images captured by earth orbiting satellites. Due to the extremely large image coverage area (e.g., thousands square kilometers), candidate targets in these images are much smaller, dimer, more changeable than those targets observed by aerial-based and land-based imaging devices. Existing short imaging distance-based infrared datasets and target detection methods cannot be well adopted to the space-based surveillance task. To address these problems, we develop a space-based infrared tiny ship detection dataset (namely, NUDT-SIRST-Sea) with 48 space-based infrared images and 17598 pixel-level tiny ship annotations. Each image covers about 10000 square kilometers of area with 10000X10000 pixels. Considering the extreme characteristics (e.g., small, dim, changeable) of those tiny ships in such challenging scenes, we propose a multi-level TransUNet (MTU-Net) in this paper. Specifically, we design a Vision Transformer (ViT) Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) hybrid encoder to extract multi-level features. Local feature maps are first extracted by several convolution layers and then fed into the multi-level feature extraction module (MVTM) to capture long-distance dependency. We further propose a copy-rotate-resize-paste (CRRP) data augmentation approach to accelerate the training phase, which effectively alleviates the issue of sample imbalance between targets and background. Besides, we design a FocalIoU loss to achieve both target localization and shape description. Experimental results on the NUDT-SIRST-Sea dataset show that our MTU-Net outperforms traditional and existing deep learning based SIRST methods in terms of probability of detection, false alarm rate and intersection over union.
summary: Space-based infrared tiny ship detection aims at separating tiny ships from the images captured by earth orbiting satellites. Due to the extremely large image coverage area (e.g., thousands square kilometers), candidate targets in these images are much smaller, dimer, more changeable than those targets observed by aerial-based and land-based imaging devices. Existing short imaging distance-based infrared datasets and target detection methods cannot be well adopted to the space-based surveillance task. To address these problems, we develop a space-based infrared tiny ship detection dataset (namely, NUDT-SIRST-Sea) with 48 space-based infrared images and 17598 pixel-level tiny ship annotations. Each image covers about 10000 square kilometers of area with 10000X10000 pixels. Considering the extreme characteristics (e.g., small, dim, changeable) of those tiny ships in such challenging scenes, we propose a multi-level TransUNet (MTU-Net) in this paper. Specifically, we design a Vision Transformer (ViT) Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) hybrid encoder to extract multi-level features. Local feature maps are first extracted by several convolution layers and then fed into the multi-level feature extraction module (MVTM) to capture long-distance dependency. We further propose a copy-rotate-resize-paste (CRRP) data augmentation approach to accelerate the training phase, which effectively alleviates the issue of sample imbalance between targets and background. Besides, we design a FocalIoU loss to achieve both target localization and shape description. Experimental results on the NUDT-SIRST-Sea dataset show that our MTU-Net outperforms traditional and existing deep learning based SIRST methods in terms of probability of detection, false alarm rate and intersection over union.
abstract_zh: 天基红外微小船舶探测旨在将微小船舶与地球轨道卫星捕获的图像分开。由于图像覆盖面积极大（例如数千平方公里），这些图像中的候选目标比空基和陆基成像设备观测到的目标要小得多、颜色更暗、变化更大。现有的基于短成像距离的红外数据集和目标检测方法不能很好地应用于天基监视任务。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一个天基红外小船检测数据集（即NUDT-SIRST-Sea），包含48张天基红外图像和17598个像素级小船注释。每张图像覆盖约 10000 平方公里的区域，像素为 10000X10000。考虑到这些微型船舶在如此具有挑战性的场景中的极端特征（例如，小、昏暗、多变），我们在本文中提出了一种多级 TransUNet（MTU-Net）。具体来说，我们设计了一个视觉变换器（ViT）卷积神经网络（CNN）混合编码器来提取多级特征。局部特征图首先由几个卷积层提取，然后输入多级特征提取模块（MVTM）以捕获长距离依赖性。我们进一步提出了一种复制-旋转-调整大小-粘贴（CRRP）数据增强方法来加速训练阶段，有效缓解目标和背景之间的样本不平衡问题。此外，我们设计了 FocalIoU 损失来实现目标定位和形状描述。 NUDT-SIRST-Sea 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 MTU-Net 在检测概率、误报率和并集交集方面优于传统和现有的基于深度学习的 SIRST 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MTU-Net，一种多级TransUNet模型，用于解决空间红外微小船舶检测中的挑战性问题。
AI.motivation: 空间红外微小船舶检测因目标尺寸极小、亮度低且场景复杂，现有基于短距成像的数据集和检测方法难以适应大范围卫星图像的检测需求。
AI.method: 构建包含48张空间红外图像的NUDT-SIRST-Sea数据集，设计融合ViT与CNN的多级特征提取模块（MVTM），结合CRRP数据增强策略与FocalIoU损失函数优化检测性能。
AI.result: 在NUDT-SIRST-Sea数据集上，MTU-Net在检测概率、误报率和交并比（IoU）指标上均优于传统及现有深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: MTU-Net通过多级特征融合与针对性优化策略，有效解决了空间红外微小目标检测中的小尺寸、低亮度和场景复杂性难题。

search_text: MTU-Net: Multi-level TransUNet for Space-based Infrared Tiny Ship Detection MTU-Net：用于天基红外微型船舶检测的多级TransUNet Space-based infrared tiny ship detection aims at separating tiny ships from the images captured by earth orbiting satellites. Due to the extremely large image coverage area (e.g., thousands square kilometers), candidate targets in these images are much smaller, dimer, more changeable than those targets observed by aerial-based and land-based imaging devices. Existing short imaging distance-based infrared datasets and target detection methods cannot be well adopted to the space-based surveillance task. To address these problems, we develop a space-based infrared tiny ship detection dataset (namely, NUDT-SIRST-Sea) with 48 space-based infrared images and 17598 pixel-level tiny ship annotations. Each image covers about 10000 square kilometers of area with 10000X10000 pixels. Considering the extreme characteristics (e.g., small, dim, changeable) of those tiny ships in such challenging scenes, we propose a multi-level TransUNet (MTU-Net) in this paper. Specifically, we design a Vision Transformer (ViT) Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) hybrid encoder to extract multi-level features. Local feature maps are first extracted by several convolution layers and then fed into the multi-level feature extraction module (MVTM) to capture long-distance dependency. We further propose a copy-rotate-resize-paste (CRRP) data augmentation approach to accelerate the training phase, which effectively alleviates the issue of sample imbalance between targets and background. Besides, we design a FocalIoU loss to achieve both target localization and shape description. Experimental results on the NUDT-SIRST-Sea dataset show that our MTU-Net outperforms traditional and existing deep learning based SIRST methods in terms of probability of detection, false alarm rate and intersection over union. 天基红外微小船舶探测旨在将微小船舶与地球轨道卫星捕获的图像分开。由于图像覆盖面积极大（例如数千平方公里），这些图像中的候选目标比空基和陆基成像设备观测到的目标要小得多、颜色更暗、变化更大。现有的基于短成像距离的红外数据集和目标检测方法不能很好地应用于天基监视任务。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一个天基红外小船检测数据集（即NUDT-SIRST-Sea），包含48张天基红外图像和17598个像素级小船注释。每张图像覆盖约 10000 平方公里的区域，像素为 10000X10000。考虑到这些微型船舶在如此具有挑战性的场景中的极端特征（例如，小、昏暗、多变），我们在本文中提出了一种多级 TransUNet（MTU-Net）。具体来说，我们设计了一个视觉变换器（ViT）卷积神经网络（CNN）混合编码器来提取多级特征。局部特征图首先由几个卷积层提取，然后输入多级特征提取模块（MVTM）以捕获长距离依赖性。我们进一步提出了一种复制-旋转-调整大小-粘贴（CRRP）数据增强方法来加速训练阶段，有效缓解目标和背景之间的样本不平衡问题。此外，我们设计了 FocalIoU 损失来实现目标定位和形状描述。 NUDT-SIRST-Sea 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 MTU-Net 在检测概率、误报率和并集交集方面优于传统和现有的基于深度学习的 SIRST 方法。 本文提出MTU-Net，一种多级TransUNet模型，用于解决空间红外微小船舶检测中的挑战性问题。 Tianhao Wu,Boyang Li,Yihang Luo,Yingqian Wang,Chao Xiao,Ting Liu,Jungang Yang,Wei An,Yulan Guo cs.CV

authors_text: Miranda Cravetz,Cindy Grimm,Joseph R. Davidson
title: Optimization-Based Mechanical Perception for Peduncle Localization During Robotic Fruit Harvest
title_zh: 机器人水果采收过程中基于优化的机械感知花梗定位
abstract: Rising global food demand and harsh working conditions make fruit harvest an important domain to automate. Peduncle localization is an important step for any automated fruit harvesting system, since fruit separation techniques are highly sensitive to peduncle location. Most work on peduncle localization has focused on computer vision, but peduncles can be difficult to visually access due to the cluttered nature of agricultural environments. Our work proposes an alternative method which relies on mechanical -- rather than visual -- perception to localize the peduncle. To estimate the location of this important plant feature, we fit wrench measurements from a wrist force/torque sensor to a physical model of the fruit-plant system, treating the fruit's attachment point as a parameter to be tuned. This method is performed inline as part of the fruit picking procedure. Using our orchard proxy for evaluation, we demonstrate that the technique is able to localize the peduncle within a median distance of 3.8 cm and median orientation error of 16.8 degrees.
summary: Rising global food demand and harsh working conditions make fruit harvest an important domain to automate. Peduncle localization is an important step for any automated fruit harvesting system, since fruit separation techniques are highly sensitive to peduncle location. Most work on peduncle localization has focused on computer vision, but peduncles can be difficult to visually access due to the cluttered nature of agricultural environments. Our work proposes an alternative method which relies on mechanical -- rather than visual -- perception to localize the peduncle. To estimate the location of this important plant feature, we fit wrench measurements from a wrist force/torque sensor to a physical model of the fruit-plant system, treating the fruit's attachment point as a parameter to be tuned. This method is performed inline as part of the fruit picking procedure. Using our orchard proxy for evaluation, we demonstrate that the technique is able to localize the peduncle within a median distance of 3.8 cm and median orientation error of 16.8 degrees.
abstract_zh: 全球粮食需求的不断增长和恶劣的工作条件使得水果采收成为自动化的重要领域。花梗定位对于任何自动化水果收获系统来说都是重要的步骤，因为水果分离技术对花梗位置高度敏感。大多数关于花梗定位的工作都集中在计算机视觉上，但由于农业环境的混乱性质，花梗可能很难通过视觉访问。我们的工作提出了一种替代方法，该方法依靠机械而非视觉感知来定位花梗。为了估计这一重要植物特征的位置，我们将手腕力/扭矩传感器的扳手测量结果拟合到水果植物系统的物理模型中，将水果的附着点作为要调整的参数。该方法作为水果采摘程序的一部分在线执行。使用我们的果园代理进行评估，我们证明该技术能够将花序梗定位在中值距离 3.8 厘米和中值方向误差 16.8 度的范围内。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机械感知的优化方法，用于机器人采摘过程中定位水果果柄，以提高自动化采摘的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉方法在复杂农业环境中难以精准定位果柄，而果柄位置对采摘分离技术至关重要，需开发更可靠的替代方案。
AI.method: 通过腕部力/扭矩传感器获取力学数据，结合水果-植物系统的物理模型，将果柄连接点作为参数进行优化拟合，实现实时定位。
AI.result: 在果园测试中，果柄定位的中位数距离误差为3.8厘米，方向误差为16.8度，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该机械感知方法为自动化水果采摘提供了新思路，能够在复杂环境中实现较高精度的果柄定位。
