search_text: Optimization-Based Mechanical Perception for Peduncle Localization During Robotic Fruit Harvest 机器人水果采收过程中基于优化的机械感知花梗定位 Rising global food demand and harsh working conditions make fruit harvest an important domain to automate. Peduncle localization is an important step for any automated fruit harvesting system, since fruit separation techniques are highly sensitive to peduncle location. Most work on peduncle localization has focused on computer vision, but peduncles can be difficult to visually access due to the cluttered nature of agricultural environments. Our work proposes an alternative method which relies on mechanical -- rather than visual -- perception to localize the peduncle. To estimate the location of this important plant feature, we fit wrench measurements from a wrist force/torque sensor to a physical model of the fruit-plant system, treating the fruit's attachment point as a parameter to be tuned. This method is performed inline as part of the fruit picking procedure. Using our orchard proxy for evaluation, we demonstrate that the technique is able to localize the peduncle within a median distance of 3.8 cm and median orientation error of 16.8 degrees. 全球粮食需求的不断增长和恶劣的工作条件使得水果采收成为自动化的重要领域。花梗定位对于任何自动化水果收获系统来说都是重要的步骤，因为水果分离技术对花梗位置高度敏感。大多数关于花梗定位的工作都集中在计算机视觉上，但由于农业环境的混乱性质，花梗可能很难通过视觉访问。我们的工作提出了一种替代方法，该方法依靠机械而非视觉感知来定位花梗。为了估计这一重要植物特征的位置，我们将手腕力/扭矩传感器的扳手测量结果拟合到水果植物系统的物理模型中，将水果的附着点作为要调整的参数。该方法作为水果采摘程序的一部分在线执行。使用我们的果园代理进行评估，我们证明该技术能够将花序梗定位在中值距离 3.8 厘米和中值方向误差 16.8 度的范围内。 本文提出一种基于机械感知的优化方法，用于机器人采摘过程中定位水果果柄，以提高自动化采摘的准确性。 Miranda Cravetz,Cindy Grimm,Joseph R. Davidson cs.RO

authors_text: Rahul Duggal,Hao Zhou,Shuo Yang,Jun Fang,Yuanjun Xiong,Wei Xia
title: Towards Regression-Free Neural Networks for Diverse Compute Platforms
title_zh: 面向多种计算平台的无回归神经网络
abstract: With the shift towards on-device deep learning, ensuring a consistent behavior of an AI service across diverse compute platforms becomes tremendously important. Our work tackles the emergent problem of reducing predictive inconsistencies arising as negative flips: test samples that are correctly predicted by a less accurate model, but incorrectly by a more accurate one. We introduce REGression constrained Neural Architecture Search (REG-NAS) to design a family of highly accurate models that engender fewer negative flips. REG-NAS consists of two components: (1) A novel architecture constraint that enables a larger model to contain all the weights of the smaller one thus maximizing weight sharing. This idea stems from our observation that larger weight sharing among networks leads to similar sample-wise predictions and results in fewer negative flips; (2) A novel search reward that incorporates both Top-1 accuracy and negative flips in the architecture search metric. We demonstrate that \regnas can successfully find desirable architectures with few negative flips in three popular architecture search spaces. Compared to the existing state-of-the-art approach, REG-NAS enables 33-48% relative reduction of negative flips.
summary: With the shift towards on-device deep learning, ensuring a consistent behavior of an AI service across diverse compute platforms becomes tremendously important. Our work tackles the emergent problem of reducing predictive inconsistencies arising as negative flips: test samples that are correctly predicted by a less accurate model, but incorrectly by a more accurate one. We introduce REGression constrained Neural Architecture Search (REG-NAS) to design a family of highly accurate models that engender fewer negative flips. REG-NAS consists of two components: (1) A novel architecture constraint that enables a larger model to contain all the weights of the smaller one thus maximizing weight sharing. This idea stems from our observation that larger weight sharing among networks leads to similar sample-wise predictions and results in fewer negative flips; (2) A novel search reward that incorporates both Top-1 accuracy and negative flips in the architecture search metric. We demonstrate that \regnas can successfully find desirable architectures with few negative flips in three popular architecture search spaces. Compared to the existing state-of-the-art approach, REG-NAS enables 33-48% relative reduction of negative flips.
abstract_zh: 随着向设备端深度学习的转变，确保人工智能服务在不同计算平台上的行为一致变得非常重要。我们的工作解决了减少因负翻转而产生的预测不一致的新问题：测试由不太准确的模型正确预测的样本，但由更准确的模型错误预测的样本。我们引入回归约束神经架构搜索（REG-NAS）来设计一系列高精度模型，从而减少负面翻转。 REG-NAS 由两个组件组成：（1）一种新颖的架构约束，使较大的模型能够包含较小模型的所有权重，从而最大化权重共享。这个想法源于我们的观察，即网络之间更大的权重共享会导致类似的样本预测，并导致更少的负面翻转； (2) 一种新颖的搜索奖励，在架构搜索指标中结合了 Top-1 准确率和负翻转。我们证明 \regnas 可以在三个流行的架构搜索空间中成功找到所需的架构，而几乎没有负面翻转。与现有最先进的方法相比，REG-NAS 可以相对减少 33-48% 的负翻转。

AI.tldr: 本文提出REG-NAS方法，通过架构约束和搜索奖励机制设计高精度神经网络，减少跨平台预测不一致现象。
AI.motivation: 随着边缘设备深度学习普及，不同计算平台间模型预测结果的不一致（负面翻转）会影响服务可靠性，需解决模型精度提升导致的预测行为不稳定问题。
AI.method: REG-NAS包含两部分：1）强制大模型包含小模型权重以最大化权重共享；2）在架构搜索中联合优化Top-1准确率和负面翻转指标作为奖励函数。
AI.result: 在三个主流架构搜索空间验证中，相比现有最优方法实现33-48%的负面翻转相对减少。
AI.conclusion: REG-NAS通过权重共享约束和联合优化指标，有效降低跨平台模型预测不一致性，为边缘设备部署提供更稳定的解决方案。

search_text: Towards Regression-Free Neural Networks for Diverse Compute Platforms 面向多种计算平台的无回归神经网络 With the shift towards on-device deep learning, ensuring a consistent behavior of an AI service across diverse compute platforms becomes tremendously important. Our work tackles the emergent problem of reducing predictive inconsistencies arising as negative flips: test samples that are correctly predicted by a less accurate model, but incorrectly by a more accurate one. We introduce REGression constrained Neural Architecture Search (REG-NAS) to design a family of highly accurate models that engender fewer negative flips. REG-NAS consists of two components: (1) A novel architecture constraint that enables a larger model to contain all the weights of the smaller one thus maximizing weight sharing. This idea stems from our observation that larger weight sharing among networks leads to similar sample-wise predictions and results in fewer negative flips; (2) A novel search reward that incorporates both Top-1 accuracy and negative flips in the architecture search metric. We demonstrate that \regnas can successfully find desirable architectures with few negative flips in three popular architecture search spaces. Compared to the existing state-of-the-art approach, REG-NAS enables 33-48% relative reduction of negative flips. 随着向设备端深度学习的转变，确保人工智能服务在不同计算平台上的行为一致变得非常重要。我们的工作解决了减少因负翻转而产生的预测不一致的新问题：测试由不太准确的模型正确预测的样本，但由更准确的模型错误预测的样本。我们引入回归约束神经架构搜索（REG-NAS）来设计一系列高精度模型，从而减少负面翻转。 REG-NAS 由两个组件组成：（1）一种新颖的架构约束，使较大的模型能够包含较小模型的所有权重，从而最大化权重共享。这个想法源于我们的观察，即网络之间更大的权重共享会导致类似的样本预测，并导致更少的负面翻转； (2) 一种新颖的搜索奖励，在架构搜索指标中结合了 Top-1 准确率和负翻转。我们证明 \regnas 可以在三个流行的架构搜索空间中成功找到所需的架构，而几乎没有负面翻转。与现有最先进的方法相比，REG-NAS 可以相对减少 33-48% 的负翻转。 本文提出REG-NAS方法，通过架构约束和搜索奖励机制设计高精度神经网络，减少跨平台预测不一致现象。 Rahul Duggal,Hao Zhou,Shuo Yang,Jun Fang,Yuanjun Xiong,Wei Xia cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Rachel Gehlhar,Aaron D. Ames
title: Emulating Human Kinematic Behavior on Lower-Limb Prostheses via Multi-Contact Models and Force-Based Nonlinear Control
title_zh: 通过多接触模型和基于力的非线性控制在下肢假肢上模拟人类运动行为
abstract: Ankle push-off largely contributes to limb energy generation in human walking, leading to smoother and more efficient locomotion. Providing this net positive work to an amputee requires an active prosthesis, but has the potential to enable more natural assisted locomotion. To this end, this paper uses multi-contact models of locomotion together with force-based nonlinear optimization-based controllers to achieve human-like kinematic behavior, including ankle push-off, on a powered transfemoral prosthesis for 2 subjects. In particular, we leverage model-based control approaches for dynamic bipedal robotic walking to develop a systematic method to realize human-like walking on a powered prosthesis that does not require subject-specific tuning. We begin by synthesizing an optimization problem that yields gaits that resemble human joint trajectories at a kinematic level, and realize these gaits on a prosthesis through a control Lyapunov function based nonlinear controller that responds to real-time ground reaction forces and interaction forces with the human. The proposed controller is implemented on a prosthesis for two subjects without tuning between subjects, emulating subject-specific human kinematic trends on the prosthesis joints. These experimental results demonstrate that our force-based nonlinear control approach achieves better tracking of human kinematic trajectories than traditional methods.
summary: Ankle push-off largely contributes to limb energy generation in human walking, leading to smoother and more efficient locomotion. Providing this net positive work to an amputee requires an active prosthesis, but has the potential to enable more natural assisted locomotion. To this end, this paper uses multi-contact models of locomotion together with force-based nonlinear optimization-based controllers to achieve human-like kinematic behavior, including ankle push-off, on a powered transfemoral prosthesis for 2 subjects. In particular, we leverage model-based control approaches for dynamic bipedal robotic walking to develop a systematic method to realize human-like walking on a powered prosthesis that does not require subject-specific tuning. We begin by synthesizing an optimization problem that yields gaits that resemble human joint trajectories at a kinematic level, and realize these gaits on a prosthesis through a control Lyapunov function based nonlinear controller that responds to real-time ground reaction forces and interaction forces with the human. The proposed controller is implemented on a prosthesis for two subjects without tuning between subjects, emulating subject-specific human kinematic trends on the prosthesis joints. These experimental results demonstrate that our force-based nonlinear control approach achieves better tracking of human kinematic trajectories than traditional methods.
abstract_zh: 脚踝推出在很大程度上有助于人类行走时肢体能量的产生，从而使运动更平稳、更高效。为截肢者提供这种净正功需要主动假肢，但有可能实现更自然的辅助运动。为此，本文使用多接触运动模型以及基于力的非线性优化控制器，在 2 名受试者的动力经股假肢上实现类人运动行为，包括踝关节推出。特别是，我们利用基于模型的动态双足机器人行走控制方法来开发一种系统方法，以在不需要特定主题调整的动力假肢上实现类人行走。我们首先综合一个优化问题，该问题在运动学水平上产生类似于人类关节轨迹的步态，并通过基于控制李亚普诺夫函数的非线性控制器在假肢上实现这些步态，该控制器响应实时地面反作用力和与人体的相互作用力。所提出的控制器在两个受试者的假肢上实现，无需在受试者之间进行调整，从而在假肢关节上模拟受试者特定的人体运动趋势。这些实验结果表明，我们的基于力的非线性控制方法比传统方法能够更好地跟踪人体运动轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多接触模型和力反馈非线性控制的方法，使双大腿截肢者的动力假肢能够模仿人类步态的运动学特征，包括踝关节推进动作。
AI.motivation: 人类行走时踝关节推进为肢体提供净正功，使步态更流畅高效。传统假肢难以实现这一自然运动学特征，且现有方法常需依赖个体化参数调校。
AI.method: 结合动态双足机器人控制理论，建立多接触模型并设计基于控制李雅普诺夫函数的非线性控制器，通过实时地面反作用力和人体交互力实现步态优化，无需个体化参数调整。
AI.result: 在两名受试者上验证该方法，实验表明假肢关节运动学轨迹跟踪精度优于传统方法，成功复现了人类步态的个体化运动特征。
AI.conclusion: 基于力反馈的非线性控制方法能有效实现假肢的人类运动学行为模仿，为无需个体化调校的动力假肢控制提供了系统性解决方案。

authors_text: Vitor Jeronymo,Mauricio Nascimento,Roberto Lotufo,Rodrigo Nogueira
title: mRobust04: A Multilingual Version of the TREC Robust 2004 Benchmark
title_zh: mRobust04：TREC Robust 2004 基准的多语言版本
abstract: Robust 2004 is an information retrieval benchmark whose large number of judgments per query make it a reliable evaluation dataset. In this paper, we present mRobust04, a multilingual version of Robust04 that was translated to 8 languages using Google Translate. We also provide results of three different multilingual retrievers on this dataset. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/unicamp-dl/mrobust
summary: Robust 2004 is an information retrieval benchmark whose large number of judgments per query make it a reliable evaluation dataset. In this paper, we present mRobust04, a multilingual version of Robust04 that was translated to 8 languages using Google Translate. We also provide results of three different multilingual retrievers on this dataset. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/unicamp-dl/mrobust
abstract_zh: Robust 2004 是一个信息检索基准，其每个查询的大量判断使其成为可靠的评估数据集。在本文中，我们介绍了 mRobust04，这是 Robust04 的多语言版本，已使用 Google 翻译翻译成 8 种语言。我们还提供了该数据集上三种不同多语言检索器的结果。该数据集可在 https://huggingface.co/datasets/unicamp-dl/mrobust 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出mRobust04，即TREC Robust 2004基准的多语言版本，并测试了三种多语言检索器的性能。
AI.motivation: Robust 2004因拥有大量查询判断而成为可靠评估数据集，但缺乏多语言支持，限制了其在跨语言信息检索研究中的应用。
AI.method: 使用Google Translate将Robust04数据集翻译为8种语言，并在该数据集上评估三种多语言检索方法。
AI.result: 展示了三种多语言检索器在mRobust04数据集上的实验结果，验证了数据集的可行性。
AI.conclusion: mRobust04为多语言信息检索研究提供了标准化基准，推动了跨语言检索技术的发展。

The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/unicamp-dl/mrobust Robust 2004 是一个信息检索基准，其每个查询的大量判断使其成为可靠的评估数据集。在本文中，我们介绍了 mRobust04，这是 Robust04 的多语言版本，已使用 Google 翻译翻译成 8 种语言。我们还提供了该数据集上三种不同多语言检索器的结果。该数据集可在 https://huggingface.co/datasets/unicamp-dl/mrobust 获取 本文提出mRobust04，即TREC Robust 2004基准的多语言版本，并测试了三种多语言检索器的性能。 Vitor Jeronymo,Mauricio Nascimento,Roberto Lotufo,Rodrigo Nogueira cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Jasmine Jerry Aloor,Jay Patrikar,Parv Kapoor,Jean Oh,Sebastian Scherer
title: Follow The Rules: Online Signal Temporal Logic Tree Search for Guided Imitation Learning in Stochastic Domains
title_zh: 遵循规则：随机域中引导模仿学习的在线信号时态逻辑树搜索
comment: Accepted for publication at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023, 7 pages
comments: Accepted for publication at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023, 7 pages
abstract: Seamlessly integrating rules in Learning-from-Demonstrations (LfD) policies is a critical requirement to enable the real-world deployment of AI agents. Recently, Signal Temporal Logic (STL) has been shown to be an effective language for encoding rules as spatio-temporal constraints. This work uses Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) as a means of integrating STL specification into a vanilla LfD policy to improve constraint satisfaction. We propose augmenting the MCTS heuristic with STL robustness values to bias the tree search towards branches with higher constraint satisfaction. While the domain-independent method can be applied to integrate STL rules online into any pre-trained LfD algorithm, we choose goal-conditioned Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning as the offline LfD policy. We apply the proposed method to the domain of planning trajectories for General Aviation aircraft around a non-towered airfield. Results using the simulator trained on real-world data showcase 60% improved performance over baseline LfD methods that do not use STL heuristics.
summary: Seamlessly integrating rules in Learning-from-Demonstrations (LfD) policies is a critical requirement to enable the real-world deployment of AI agents. Recently, Signal Temporal Logic (STL) has been shown to be an effective language for encoding rules as spatio-temporal constraints. This work uses Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) as a means of integrating STL specification into a vanilla LfD policy to improve constraint satisfaction. We propose augmenting the MCTS heuristic with STL robustness values to bias the tree search towards branches with higher constraint satisfaction. While the domain-independent method can be applied to integrate STL rules online into any pre-trained LfD algorithm, we choose goal-conditioned Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning as the offline LfD policy. We apply the proposed method to the domain of planning trajectories for General Aviation aircraft around a non-towered airfield. Results using the simulator trained on real-world data showcase 60% improved performance over baseline LfD methods that do not use STL heuristics.
abstract_zh: 将规则无缝集成到演示学习 (LfD) 策略中是实现人工智能代理实际部署的关键要求。最近，信号时间逻辑（STL）已被证明是一种将规则编码为时空约束的有效语言。这项工作使用蒙特卡罗树搜索 (MCTS) 作为将 STL 规范集成到普通 LfD 策略中的方法，以提高约束满足度。我们建议使用 STL 鲁棒性值来增强 MCTS 启发式，以使树搜索偏向具有更高约束满足的分支。虽然领域无关方法可用于将 STL 规则在线集成到任何预训练的 LfD 算法中，但我们选择目标条件生成对抗性模仿学习作为离线 LfD 策略。我们将所提出的方法应用于无塔机场周围通用航空飞机的规划轨迹领域。使用基于真实世界数据训练的模拟器的结果表明，与不使用 STL 启发式的基线 LfD 方法相比，性能提高了 60%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合信号时序逻辑（STL）与蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的方法，用于在随机领域中引导模仿学习，以提高策略对规则的遵守能力。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中AI代理需要遵循规则，但传统模仿学习策略难以有效整合规则约束，而STL能有效编码时空约束，需将其与学习策略结合。
AI.method: 通过将STL鲁棒性值作为启发式函数增强MCTS，引导树搜索优先探索满足约束的分支，并基于目标条件生成对抗模仿学习（GAIL）框架实现在线规则集成。
AI.result: 在通用航空飞机轨迹规划任务中，基于真实数据训练的模拟器显示，该方法较未使用STL启发式的基线方法性能提升60%。
AI.conclusion: STL约束驱动的MCTS方法能有效提升模仿学习策略在随机领域的规则遵守能力，为现实部署提供可行方案。

authors_text: Tanweer Rashid,Hangfan Liu,Jeffrey B. Ware,Karl Li,Jose Rafael Romero,Elyas Fadaee,Ilya M. Nasrallah,Saima Hilal,R. Nick Bryan,Timothy M. Hughes,Christos Davatzikos,Lenore Launer,Sudha Seshadri,Susan R. Heckbert,Mohamad Habes
title: Deep Learning Based Detection of Enlarged Perivascular Spaces on Brain MRI
title_zh: 基于深度学习的脑 MRI 血管周围空间扩大检测
abstract: BACKGROUND AND PURPOSE: Deep learning has been demonstrated effective in many neuroimaging applications. However, in many scenarios, the number of imaging sequences capturing information related to small vessel disease lesions is insufficient to support data-driven techniques. Additionally, cohort-based studies may not always have the optimal or essential imaging sequences for accurate lesion detection. Therefore, it is necessary to determine which imaging sequences are crucial for precise detection. This study introduces a novel deep learning framework to detect enlarged perivascular spaces (ePVS) and aims to find the optimal combination of MRI sequences for deep learning-based quantification. MATERIALS AND METHODS: We implemented an effective lightweight U-Net adapted for ePVS detection and comprehensively investigated different combinations of information from SWI, FLAIR, T1-weighted (T1w), and T2-weighted (T2w) MRI sequences. The training data included 21 participants, which were randomly selected from the MESA cohort. Participants had ePVS 683 lesions on average. For T1w, T2w, and FLAIR images, the MESA study collected 3D isotropic MRI scans at six different sites with Siemens scanners. Our training data included participants from all these sites and all the scanner models, and the proposed model was applied to the whole brain instead of selective regions. RESULTS: The experimental results showed that T2w MRI is the most important for accurate ePVS detection, and the incorporation of SWI, FLAIR and T1w MRI in the deep neural network had minor improvements in accuracy and resulted in the highest sensitivity and precision (sensitivity =0.82, precision =0.83). The proposed method achieved comparable accuracy at a minimal time cost compared to manual reading.

abstract_zh: 背景和目的：深度学习已在许多神经影像应用中被证明是有效的。然而，在许多情况下，捕获与小血管疾病病变相关的信息的成像序列的数量不足以支持数据驱动的技术。此外，基于队列的研究可能并不总是具有用于准确病变检测的最佳或必要的成像序列。因此，有必要确定哪些成像序列对于精确检测至关重要。本研究引入了一种新颖的深度学习框架来检测扩大的血管周围空间（ePVS），旨在找到基于深度学习的量化的 MRI 序列的最佳组合。材料和方法：我们实现了一个适用于 ePVS 检测的有效轻量级 U-Net，并全面研究了来自 SWI、FLAIR、T1 加权 (T1w) 和 T2 加权 (T2w) MRI 序列的信息的不同组合。训练数据包括 21 名参与者，他们是从 MESA 队列中随机选择的。参与者平均有 683 个 ePVS 病变。对于 T1w、T2w 和 FLAIR 图像，MESA 研究使用西门子扫描仪收集了六个不同部位的 3D 各向同性 MRI 扫描。我们的训练数据包括来自所有这些站点和所有扫描仪模型的参与者，并且所提出的模型应用于整个大脑而不是选择性区域。结果：实验结果表明，T2w MRI对于准确的ePVS检测最为重要，而在深度神经网络中加入SWI、FLAIR和T1w MRI在准确性方面有微小的提高，并产生了最高的灵敏度和精度（灵敏度=0.82，精度=0.83）。与手动读取相比，所提出的方法以最小的时间成本实现了相当的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的框架，用于检测脑部MRI中的扩大血管周围空间（ePVS），并确定最佳的MRI序列组合以提高检测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究中，用于小血管病变检测的影像序列数量不足或不完善，导致数据驱动方法效果受限，因此需要确定关键影像序列以优化深度学习模型的性能。
AI.method: 采用轻量级U-Net网络进行ePVS检测，综合分析SWI、FLAIR、T1w和T2w序列的不同组合。训练数据来自MESA队列的21名受试者，包含平均683个ePVS病灶，并在多站点、多扫描仪的3D各向同性MRI数据上验证模型。
AI.result: 实验表明T2w序列对ePVS检测最为关键，结合SWI、FLAIR和T1w序列可小幅提升准确率，达到最高灵敏度（0.82）和精确度（0.83），且计算时间显著低于手动标注。
AI.conclusion: T2w序列是ePVS检测的核心输入，联合其他序列可进一步优化模型性能，所提方法在保持高精度的同时显著提升检测效率。

Our training data included participants from all these sites and all the scanner models, and the proposed model was applied to the whole brain instead of selective regions. RESULTS: The experimental results showed that T2w MRI is the most important for accurate ePVS detection, and the incorporation of SWI, FLAIR and T1w MRI in the deep neural network had minor improvements in accuracy and resulted in the highest sensitivity and precision (sensitivity =0.82, precision =0.83). The proposed method achieved comparable accuracy at a minimal time cost compared to manual reading. 背景和目的：深度学习已在许多神经影像应用中被证明是有效的。然而，在许多情况下，捕获与小血管疾病病变相关的信息的成像序列的数量不足以支持数据驱动的技术。此外，基于队列的研究可能并不总是具有用于准确病变检测的最佳或必要的成像序列。因此，有必要确定哪些成像序列对于精确检测至关重要。本研究引入了一种新颖的深度学习框架来检测扩大的血管周围空间（ePVS），旨在找到基于深度学习的量化的 MRI 序列的最佳组合。材料和方法：我们实现了一个适用于 ePVS 检测的有效轻量级 U-Net，并全面研究了来自 SWI、FLAIR、T1 加权 (T1w) 和 T2 加权 (T2w) MRI 序列的信息的不同组合。训练数据包括 21 名参与者，他们是从 MESA 队列中随机选择的。参与者平均有 683 个 ePVS 病变。对于 T1w、T2w 和 FLAIR 图像，MESA 研究使用西门子扫描仪收集了六个不同部位的 3D 各向同性 MRI 扫描。我们的训练数据包括来自所有这些站点和所有扫描仪模型的参与者，并且所提出的模型应用于整个大脑而不是选择性区域。结果：实验结果表明，T2w MRI对于准确的ePVS检测最为重要，而在深度神经网络中加入SWI、FLAIR和T1w MRI在准确性方面有微小的提高，并产生了最高的灵敏度和精度（灵敏度=0.82，精度=0.83）。与手动读取相比，所提出的方法以最小的时间成本实现了相当的精度。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的框架，用于检测脑部MRI中的扩大血管周围空间（ePVS），并确定最佳的MRI序列组合以提高检测准确性。 Tanweer Rashid,Hangfan Liu,Jeffrey B. Ware,Karl Li,Jose Rafael Romero,Elyas Fadaee,Ilya M. Nasrallah,Saima Hilal,R. Nick Bryan,Timothy M. Hughes,Christos Davatzikos,Lenore Launer,Sudha Seshadri,Susan R. Heckbert,Mohamad Habes eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sanjana Chintalapati,Jonathan Bragg,Lucy Lu Wang
title: A Dataset of Alt Texts from HCI Publications: Analyses and Uses Towards Producing More Descriptive Alt Texts of Data Visualizations in Scientific Papers
title_zh: HCI 出版物中的替代文本数据集：分析和使用以生成科学论文中数据可视化的更具描述性的替代文本
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables, published at ASSETS 2022
comments: 11 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables, published at ASSETS 2022
abstract: Figures in scientific publications contain important information and results, and alt text is needed for blind and low vision readers to engage with their content. We conduct a study to characterize the semantic content of alt text in HCI publications based on a framework introduced by Lundgard and Satyanarayan. Our study focuses on alt text for graphs, charts, and plots extracted from HCI and accessibility publications; we focus on these communities due to the lack of alt text in papers published outside of these disciplines. We find that the capacity of author-written alt text to fulfill blind and low vision user needs is mixed; for example, only 50% of alt texts in our sample contain information about extrema or outliers, and only 31% contain information about major trends or comparisons conveyed by the graph. We release our collected dataset of author-written alt text, and outline possible ways that it can be used to develop tools and models to assist future authors in writing better alt text. Based on our findings, we also discuss recommendations that can be acted upon by publishers and authors to encourage inclusion of more types of semantic content in alt text.
summary: Figures in scientific publications contain important information and results, and alt text is needed for blind and low vision readers to engage with their content. We conduct a study to characterize the semantic content of alt text in HCI publications based on a framework introduced by Lundgard and Satyanarayan. Our study focuses on alt text for graphs, charts, and plots extracted from HCI and accessibility publications; we focus on these communities due to the lack of alt text in papers published outside of these disciplines. We find that the capacity of author-written alt text to fulfill blind and low vision user needs is mixed; for example, only 50% of alt texts in our sample contain information about extrema or outliers, and only 31% contain information about major trends or comparisons conveyed by the graph. We release our collected dataset of author-written alt text, and outline possible ways that it can be used to develop tools and models to assist future authors in writing better alt text. Based on our findings, we also discuss recommendations that can be acted upon by publishers and authors to encourage inclusion of more types of semantic content in alt text.
abstract_zh: 科学出版物中的图表包含重要的信息和结果，盲人和弱视读者需要替代文本来理解其内容。我们基于 Lundgard 和 Satyanarayan 引入的框架进行了一项研究，以表征 HCI 出版物中替代文本的语义内容。我们的研究重点是从 HCI 和可访问性出版物中提取的图形、图表和绘图的替代文本；由于在这些学科之外发表的论文中缺乏替代文本，我们重点关注这些社区。我们发现作者编写的替代文本满足盲人和弱视用户需求的能力参差不齐；例如，我们样本中只有 50% 的替代文本包含有关极值或异常值的信息，只有 31% 包含有关图表传达的主要趋势或比较的信息。我们发布了收集的作者撰写的替代文本数据集，并概述了可用于开发工具和模型的可能方法，以帮助未来的作者编写更好的替代文本。根据我们的发现，我们还讨论了出版商和作者可以采取行动的建议，以鼓励在替代文本中包含更多类型的语义内容。

AI.tldr: 该论文收集并分析了HCI领域科学论文中图表的替代文本数据集，旨在改进数据可视化的描述性替代文本。
AI.motivation: 科学论文中的图表需要替代文本以帮助视障读者，但现有替代文本常缺乏关键信息，需通过分析提出改进方案。
AI.method: 基于Lundgard和Satyanarayan的框架，从HCI及无障碍领域文献中提取图表类替代文本，分析其语义内容覆盖情况。
AI.result: 发现仅50%替代文本包含极值/异常值信息，31%包含主要趋势或比较信息，表明当前描述存在明显不足。
AI.conclusion: 发布数据集并提出工具开发方向，建议出版方和作者加强替代文本的语义信息完整性。

authors_text: Ran Jing,Meredith L. Anderson,Miguel Ianus-Valdivia,Amsal Akber Ali,Carmel Majidi,Andrew P. Sabelhaus
title: Safe Balancing Control of a Soft Legged Robot
title_zh: 软腿机器人的安全平衡控制
abstract: Legged robots constructed from soft materials are commonly claimed to demonstrate safer, more robust environmental interactions than their rigid counterparts. However, this motivating feature of soft robots requires more rigorous development for comparison to rigid locomotion. This article presents a soft legged robot platform, Horton, and a feedback control system with safety guarantees on some aspects of its operation. The robot is constructed using a series of soft limbs, actuated by thermal shape memory alloy (SMA) wire muscles, with sensors for its position and its actuator temperatures. A supervisory control scheme maintains safe actuator states during the operation of a separate controller for the robot's pose. Experiments demonstrate that Horton can lift its leg and maintain a balancing stance, a precursor to locomotion. The supervisor is verified in hardware via a human interaction test during balancing, keeping all SMA muscles below a temperature threshold. This work represents the first demonstration of a safety-verified feedback system on any soft legged robot.
summary: Legged robots constructed from soft materials are commonly claimed to demonstrate safer, more robust environmental interactions than their rigid counterparts. However, this motivating feature of soft robots requires more rigorous development for comparison to rigid locomotion. This article presents a soft legged robot platform, Horton, and a feedback control system with safety guarantees on some aspects of its operation. The robot is constructed using a series of soft limbs, actuated by thermal shape memory alloy (SMA) wire muscles, with sensors for its position and its actuator temperatures. A supervisory control scheme maintains safe actuator states during the operation of a separate controller for the robot's pose. Experiments demonstrate that Horton can lift its leg and maintain a balancing stance, a precursor to locomotion. The supervisor is verified in hardware via a human interaction test during balancing, keeping all SMA muscles below a temperature threshold. This work represents the first demonstration of a safety-verified feedback system on any soft legged robot.
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为，由软材料制成的腿式机器人比刚性机器人表现出更安全、更强大的环境相互作用。然而，与刚性运动相比，软机器人的这种激励功能需要更严格的开发。本文介绍了一种软腿机器人平台Horton，以及在其运行的某些方面具有安全保证的反馈控制系统。该机器人由一系列软肢构成，由热形状记忆合金（SMA）线肌肉驱动，并配有位置传感器和执行器温度传感器。监督控制方案在机器人姿态的单独控制器运行期间维持安全的执行器状态。实验表明，霍顿可以抬起腿并保持平衡姿势，这是运动的先兆。监控器在平衡过程中通过人机交互测试在硬件中进行验证，使所有 SMA 肌肉保持在温度阈值以下。这项工作代表了软腿机器人上经过安全验证的反馈系统的首次演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种具有安全保证的反馈控制系统，用于软足机器人Horton的平衡控制。
AI.motivation: 软体机器人被认为比刚性机器人更安全，但需要更严格的开发来验证其安全性并实现可靠运动控制。
AI.method: 采用热致形状记忆合金（SMA）驱动的软肢体，结合位置传感器和温度传感器，设计监督控制方案确保执行器安全状态。
AI.result: Horton机器人成功实现腿部抬起和平衡站立，并通过硬件测试验证了监督控制器在平衡过程中的温度安全阈值控制。
AI.conclusion: 首次在软足机器人上实现了安全验证的反馈系统，证明了软体机器人安全控制的可行性。

ai_content.conclusion: 首次在软足机器人上实现了安全验证的反馈系统，证明了软体机器人安全控制的可行性。

The robot is constructed using a series of soft limbs, actuated by thermal shape memory alloy (SMA) wire muscles, with sensors for its position and its actuator temperatures. Experiments demonstrate that Horton can lift its leg and maintain a balancing stance, a precursor to locomotion. This work represents the first demonstration of a safety-verified feedback system on any soft legged robot. 人们普遍认为，由软材料制成的腿式机器人比刚性机器人表现出更安全、更强大的环境相互作用。然而，与刚性运动相比，软机器人的这种激励功能需要更严格的开发。本文介绍了一种软腿机器人平台Horton，以及在其运行的某些方面具有安全保证的反馈控制系统。该机器人由一系列软肢构成，由热形状记忆合金（SMA）线肌肉驱动，并配有位置传感器和执行器温度传感器。监督控制方案在机器人姿态的单独控制器运行期间维持安全的执行器状态。实验表明，霍顿可以抬起腿并保持平衡姿势，这是运动的先兆。监控器在平衡过程中通过人机交互测试在硬件中进行验证，使所有 SMA 肌肉保持在温度阈值以下。这项工作代表了软腿机器人上经过安全验证的反馈系统的首次演示。 本文提出了一种具有安全保证的反馈控制系统，用于软足机器人Horton的平衡控制。 Ran Jing,Meredith L. authors_text: Youhao Steve Wang,Julian Cheng
title: A Quantum Optimization Algorithm for Single Machine Total Weighted Tardiness Minimization
title_zh: 一种单机总加权延迟最小化的量子优化算法
abstract: A single machine total weighted tardiness minimization (TWTM) problem in operational planning is considered. The problem is formulated as an NP-hard constrained combinatorial problem, which has no known deterministic polynomial complexity solution using classical computing. Based on efficient Grover's quantum search and Trugenberger's quantum optimization algorithms, a novel efficient quantum optimization algorithm is proposed to solve the NP-hard single machine TWTM problem, which makes the desired solution satisfying the searching constraints and showing the minimal TWT value be measured with the highest probability.
summary: A single machine total weighted tardiness minimization (TWTM) problem in operational planning is considered. The problem is formulated as an NP-hard constrained combinatorial problem, which has no known deterministic polynomial complexity solution using classical computing. Based on efficient Grover's quantum search and Trugenberger's quantum optimization algorithms, a novel efficient quantum optimization algorithm is proposed to solve the NP-hard single machine TWTM problem, which makes the desired solution satisfying the searching constraints and showing the minimal TWT value be measured with the highest probability.
abstract_zh: 考虑运行规划中的单机总加权迟期最小化（TWTM）问题。该问题被表述为 NP 困难约束组合问题，该问题没有使用经典计算的已知确定性多项式复杂性解决方案。基于高效的Grover量子搜索和Trugenberger的量子优化算法，提出了一种新颖的高效量子优化算法来解决NP困难的单机TWTM问题，使得期望的解决方案满足搜索约束并以最高的概率显示最小TWT值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于量子计算的优化算法，用于解决单机总加权延误时间最小化这一NP难问题。
AI.motivation: 传统经典计算方法难以在多项式时间内求解NP难的单机总加权延误时间最小化问题，需探索更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合Grover量子搜索算法与Trugenberger量子优化框架，设计新型量子优化算法以高效求解约束条件下的最优解。
AI.result: 所提算法能在满足约束条件下以最高概率测得最小总加权延误时间值，有效解决目标问题。
AI.conclusion: 量子优化算法为NP难的单机调度问题提供了新思路，验证了量子计算在组合优化领域的潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于量子计算的优化算法，用于解决单机总加权延误时间最小化这一NP难问题。

search_text: A Quantum Optimization Algorithm for Single Machine Total Weighted Tardiness Minimization 一种单机总加权延迟最小化的量子优化算法 A single machine total weighted tardiness minimization (TWTM) problem in operational planning is considered. The problem is formulated as an NP-hard constrained combinatorial problem, which has no known deterministic polynomial complexity solution using classical computing. Based on efficient Grover's quantum search and Trugenberger's quantum optimization algorithms, a novel efficient quantum optimization algorithm is proposed to solve the NP-hard single machine TWTM problem, which makes the desired solution satisfying the searching constraints and showing the minimal TWT value be measured with the highest probability. 考虑运行规划中的单机总加权迟期最小化（TWTM）问题。该问题被表述为 NP 困难约束组合问题，该问题没有使用经典计算的已知确定性多项式复杂性解决方案。基于高效的Grover量子搜索和Trugenberger的量子优化算法，提出了一种新颖的高效量子优化算法来解决NP困难的单机TWTM问题，使得期望的解决方案满足搜索约束并以最高的概率显示最小TWT值。 本文提出一种基于量子计算的优化算法，用于解决单机总加权延误时间最小化这一NP难问题。 Youhao Steve Wang,Julian Cheng cs.DS

authors_text: Cara Widmer,Md Kamruzzaman Sarker,Srikanth Nadella,Joshua Fiechter,Ion Juvina,Brandon Minnery,Pascal Hitzler,Joshua Schwartz,Michael Raymer
title: Towards Human-Compatible XAI: Explaining Data Differentials with Concept Induction over Background Knowledge
title_zh: 迈向人类兼容的 XAI：通过背景知识的概念归纳来解释数据差异
abstract: Concept induction, which is based on formal logical reasoning over description logics, has been used in ontology engineering in order to create ontology (TBox) axioms from the base data (ABox) graph. In this paper, we show that it can also be used to explain data differentials, for example in the context of Explainable AI (XAI), and we show that it can in fact be done in a way that is meaningful to a human observer. Our approach utilizes a large class hierarchy, curated from the Wikipedia category hierarchy, as background knowledge.
summary: Concept induction, which is based on formal logical reasoning over description logics, has been used in ontology engineering in order to create ontology (TBox) axioms from the base data (ABox) graph. In this paper, we show that it can also be used to explain data differentials, for example in the context of Explainable AI (XAI), and we show that it can in fact be done in a way that is meaningful to a human observer. Our approach utilizes a large class hierarchy, curated from the Wikipedia category hierarchy, as background knowledge.
abstract_zh: 概念归纳基于对描述逻辑的形式逻辑推理，已用于本体工程，以便从基础数据 (ABox) 图创建本体 (TBox) 公理。在本文中，我们表明它也可以用于解释数据差异，例如在可解释人工智能（XAI）的背景下，并且我们表明它实际上可以以对人类观察者有意义的方式来完成。我们的方法利用从维基百科类别层次结构中整理的大型类层次结构作为背景知识。

AI.tldr: 本文将概念归纳方法应用于可解释人工智能（XAI），通过结合背景知识解释数据差异，生成对人类有意义的解释。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI方法生成的解释可能缺乏人类可理解性，而概念归纳能基于形式化逻辑生成符合人类认知的解释，需结合背景知识提升效果。
AI.method: 利用维基百科分类体系构建的大型类层次作为背景知识，通过描述逻辑推理实现概念归纳，从数据差异中生成可解释的本体公理。
AI.result: 验证了该方法能有效生成符合人类直觉的数据差异解释，且解释内容与背景知识保持逻辑一致。
AI.conclusion: 概念归纳结合背景知识为XAI提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化知识库质量与推理效率以提升解释能力。

authors_text: Kaushik Shivakumar,Vainavi Viswanath,Anrui Gu,Yahav Avigal,Justin Kerr,Jeffrey Ichnowski,Richard Cheng,Thomas Kollar,Ken Goldberg
title: SGTM 2.0: Autonomously Untangling Long Cables using Interactive Perception
title_zh: SGTM 2.0：使用交互式感知自动解开长电缆
abstract: Cables are commonplace in homes, hospitals, and industrial warehouses and are prone to tangling. This paper extends prior work on autonomously untangling long cables by introducing novel uncertainty quantification metrics and actions that interact with the cable to reduce perception uncertainty. We present Sliding and Grasping for Tangle Manipulation 2.0 (SGTM 2.0), a system that autonomously untangles cables approximately 3 meters in length with a bilateral robot using estimates of uncertainty at each step to inform actions. By interactively reducing uncertainty, Sliding and Grasping for Tangle Manipulation 2.0 (SGTM 2.0) reduces the number of state-resetting moves it must take, significantly speeding up run-time. Experiments suggest that SGTM 2.0 can achieve 83% untangling success on cables with 1 or 2 overhand and figure-8 knots, and 70% termination detection success across these configurations, outperforming SGTM 1.0 by 43% in untangling accuracy and 200% in full rollout speed. Supplementary material, visualizations, and videos can be found at sites.google.com/view/sgtm2.
summary: Cables are commonplace in homes, hospitals, and industrial warehouses and are prone to tangling. This paper extends prior work on autonomously untangling long cables by introducing novel uncertainty quantification metrics and actions that interact with the cable to reduce perception uncertainty. We present Sliding and Grasping for Tangle Manipulation 2.0 (SGTM 2.0), a system that autonomously untangles cables approximately 3 meters in length with a bilateral robot using estimates of uncertainty at each step to inform actions. By interactively reducing uncertainty, Sliding and Grasping for Tangle Manipulation 2.0 (SGTM 2.0) reduces the number of state-resetting moves it must take, significantly speeding up run-time. Experiments suggest that SGTM 2.0 can achieve 83% untangling success on cables with 1 or 2 overhand and figure-8 knots, and 70% termination detection success across these configurations, outperforming SGTM 1.0 by 43% in untangling accuracy and 200% in full rollout speed. Supplementary material, visualizations, and videos can be found at sites.google.com/view/sgtm2.
abstract_zh: 电缆在家庭、医院和工业仓库中很常见，并且很容易缠结。本文通过引入新颖的不确定性量化指标和与电缆相互作用的动作来减少感知不确定性，扩展了先前关于自动解开长电缆的工作。我们推出了 Sliding and Grasping for Tangle Manipulation 2.0 (SGTM 2.0)，该系统可以使用双边机器人自动解开大约 3 米长的电缆，并使用每一步的不确定性估计来通知操作。通过交互地减少不确定性，Sliding and Grasping for Tangle Manipulation 2.0 (SGTM 2.0) 减少了必须进行的状态重置移动次数，从而显着加快了运行时间。实验表明，SGTM 2.0 在具有 1 或 2 个上手结和 8 字结的电缆上可以实现 83% 的解缠成功率，并且在这些配置中实现 70% 的端接检测成功率，在解缠精度方面比 SGTM 1.0 高出 43%，在完全展开速度方面比 SGTM 1.0 高出 200%。补充材料、可视化和视频可以在sites.google.com/view/sgtm2 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SGTM 2.0系统，通过交互式感知技术自主解开长达3米的电缆缠结。
AI.motivation: 电缆缠结在家庭、医院和工业环境中普遍存在，现有方法在解缠效率和准确性上存在不足，需减少状态重置次数以提升运行速度。
AI.method: 引入不确定性量化指标与交互动作，利用双臂机器人通过滑动和抓取操作逐步降低感知不确定性，动态调整解缠策略。
AI.result: 在1-2个死结和八字结的电缆上实现83%解缠成功率，终止检测准确率达70%，较SGTM 1.0提升43%精度和200%运行速度。
AI.conclusion: SGTM 2.0通过不确定性驱动的交互感知显著优化了解缠流程，为长电缆自主解缠提供了更高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Iason Ofeidis,Diego Kiedanski,Leandros Tassiulas
title: An Overview of the Data-Loader Landscape: Comparative Performance Analysis
title_zh: 数据加载器概况概述：性能比较分析
abstract: Dataloaders, in charge of moving data from storage into GPUs while training machine learning models, might hold the key to drastically improving the performance of training jobs. Recent advances have shown promise not only by considerably decreasing training time but also by offering new features such as loading data from remote storage like S3. In this paper, we are the first to distinguish the dataloader as a separate component in the Deep Learning (DL) workflow and to outline its structure and features. Finally, we offer a comprehensive comparison of the different dataloading libraries available, their trade-offs in terms of functionality, usability, and performance and the insights derived from them.
summary: Dataloaders, in charge of moving data from storage into GPUs while training machine learning models, might hold the key to drastically improving the performance of training jobs. Recent advances have shown promise not only by considerably decreasing training time but also by offering new features such as loading data from remote storage like S3. In this paper, we are the first to distinguish the dataloader as a separate component in the Deep Learning (DL) workflow and to outline its structure and features. Finally, we offer a comprehensive comparison of the different dataloading libraries available, their trade-offs in terms of functionality, usability, and performance and the insights derived from them.
abstract_zh: 数据加载器负责在训练机器学习模型时将数据从存储移动到 GPU，这可能是大幅提高训练作业性能的关键。最近的进展不仅显着减少了训练时间，而且还提供了新功能，例如从 S3 等远程存储加载数据，从而显示出了希望。在本文中，我们首次将数据加载器区分为深度学习（DL）工作流程中的独立组件，并概述其结构和功能。最后，我们对可用的不同数据加载库、它们在功能、可用性和性能方面的权衡以及从中得出的见解进行了全面比较。

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是对现有的数据加载库进行比较分析，评估其在功能、可用性和性能上的权衡。
AI.motivation: 数据加载器在训练性能中起关键作用，但此前未被单独系统研究，因此本文旨在填补这一空白，帮助开发者选择合适工具。
AI.method: 通过区分数据加载器为独立组件，分析其结构和功能，并对现有数据加载库进行功能、可用性和性能的全面比较。
AI.result: 结果展示了各数据加载库在功能、可用性和性能上的具体差异及适用场景。
AI.conclusion: 结论强调了数据加载器对训练效率的关键影响，并通过比较分析为开发者提供了选择合适数据加载库的依据。

search_text: An Overview of the Data-Loader Landscape: Comparative Performance Analysis 数据加载器概况概述：性能比较分析 Dataloaders, in charge of moving data from storage into GPUs while training machine learning models, might hold the key to drastically improving the performance of training jobs. Recent advances have shown promise not only by considerably decreasing training time but also by offering new features such as loading data from remote storage like S3. In this paper, we are the first to distinguish the dataloader as a separate component in the Deep Learning (DL) workflow and to outline its structure and features. Finally, we offer a comprehensive comparison of the different dataloading libraries available, their trade-offs in terms of functionality, usability, and performance and the insights derived from them. 数据加载器负责在训练机器学习模型时将数据从存储移动到 GPU，这可能是大幅提高训练作业性能的关键。最近的进展不仅显着减少了训练时间，而且还提供了新功能，例如从 S3 等远程存储加载数据，从而显示出了希望。在本文中，我们首次将数据加载器区分为深度学习（DL）工作流程中的独立组件，并概述其结构和功能。最后，我们对可用的不同数据加载库、它们在功能、可用性和性能方面的权衡以及从中得出的见解进行了全面比较。 本文的主要任务是对现有的数据加载库进行比较分析，评估其在功能、可用性和性能上的权衡。 Iason Ofeidis,Diego Kiedanski,Leandros Tassiulas cs.DC,cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.PF

authors_text: Zhaohan Xi,Ren Pang,Changjiang Li,Tianyu Du,Shouling Ji,Fenglong Ma,Ting Wang
title: Reasoning over Multi-view Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 多视图知识图推理
abstract: Recently, knowledge representation learning (KRL) is emerging as the state-of-the-art approach to process queries over knowledge graphs (KGs), wherein KG entities and the query are embedded into a latent space such that entities that answer the query are embedded close to the query. Yet, despite the intensive research on KRL, most existing studies either focus on homogenous KGs or assume KG completion tasks (i.e., inference of missing facts), while answering complex logical queries over KGs with multiple aspects (multi-view KGs) remains an open challenge. To bridge this gap, in this paper, we present ROMA, a novel KRL framework for answering logical queries over multi-view KGs. Compared with the prior work, ROMA departs in major aspects. (i) It models a multi-view KG as a set of overlaying sub-KGs, each corresponding to one view, which subsumes many types of KGs studied in the literature (e.g., temporal KGs). (ii) It supports complex logical queries with varying relation and view constraints (e.g., with complex topology and/or from multiple views); (iii) It scales up to KGs of large sizes (e.g., millions of facts) and fine-granular views (e.g., dozens of views); (iv) It generalizes to query structures and KG views that are unobserved during training. Extensive empirical evaluation on real-world KGs shows that \system significantly outperforms alternative methods.
summary: Recently, knowledge representation learning (KRL) is emerging as the state-of-the-art approach to process queries over knowledge graphs (KGs), wherein KG entities and the query are embedded into a latent space such that entities that answer the query are embedded close to the query. Yet, despite the intensive research on KRL, most existing studies either focus on homogenous KGs or assume KG completion tasks (i.e., inference of missing facts), while answering complex logical queries over KGs with multiple aspects (multi-view KGs) remains an open challenge. To bridge this gap, in this paper, we present ROMA, a novel KRL framework for answering logical queries over multi-view KGs. Compared with the prior work, ROMA departs in major aspects. (i) It models a multi-view KG as a set of overlaying sub-KGs, each corresponding to one view, which subsumes many types of KGs studied in the literature (e.g., temporal KGs). (ii) It supports complex logical queries with varying relation and view constraints (e.g., with complex topology and/or from multiple views); (iii) It scales up to KGs of large sizes (e.g., millions of facts) and fine-granular views (e.g., dozens of views); (iv) It generalizes to query structures and KG views that are unobserved during training. Extensive empirical evaluation on real-world KGs shows that \system significantly outperforms alternative methods.
abstract_zh: 最近，知识表示学习（KRL）正在成为处理知识图（KG）查询的最先进方法，其中知识图谱实体和查询被嵌入到潜在空间中，使得回答查询的实体被嵌入到查询附近。然而，尽管对 KRL 进行了深入的研究，但大多数现有研究要么关注同质知识图谱，要么假设知识图谱完成任务（即缺失事实的推断），而回答对多方面知识图谱（多视图知识图谱）的复杂逻辑查询仍然是一个开放的挑战。为了弥补这一差距，在本文中，我们提出了 ROMA，一种新颖的 KRL 框架，用于回答多视图 KG 上的逻辑查询。与之前的作品相比，《ROMA》在很多方面都有所不同。 (i) 它将多视图知识图谱建模为一组重叠的子知识图谱，每个子知识图谱对应一个视图，其中包含文献中研究的许多类型的知识图谱（例如，时间知识图谱）。 (ii) 它支持具有不同关系和视图约束的复杂逻辑查询（例如，具有复杂拓扑和/或来自多个视图）； (iii)它可以扩展到大尺寸的知识图谱（例如，数百万个事实）和细粒度的视图（例如，数十个视图）； (iv) 它泛化到训练期间未观察到的查询结构和知识图谱视图。对现实世界知识图谱的广泛实证评估表明，该系统明显优于替代方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROMA框架，用于处理多视角知识图谱中的复杂逻辑查询问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识表示学习方法多针对同质知识图谱或补全任务，难以处理多视角知识图谱的复杂逻辑查询。
AI.method: 将多视角知识图谱建模为叠加子图集，支持多视角约束查询，具备大规模扩展性和未观测结构的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在真实世界知识图谱上的实验表明，ROMA显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ROMA有效解决了多视角知识图谱中复杂逻辑查询的挑战。

authors_text: Lisa C. Adams,Felix Busch,Daniel Truhn,Marcus R. Makowski,Hugo JWL. Aerts,Keno K. Bressem
title: What Does DALL-E 2 Know About Radiology?
title_zh: DALL-E 2 了解放射学哪些知识？
abstract: Generative models such as DALL-E 2 could represent a promising future tool for image generation, augmentation, and manipulation for artificial intelligence research in radiology provided that these models have sufficient medical domain knowledge. Here we show that DALL-E 2 has learned relevant representations of X-ray images with promising capabilities in terms of zero-shot text-to-image generation of new images, continuation of an image beyond its original boundaries, or removal of elements, while pathology generation or CT, MRI, and ultrasound images are still limited. The use of generative models for augmenting and generating radiological data thus seems feasible, even if further fine-tuning and adaptation of these models to the respective domain is required beforehand.
summary: Generative models such as DALL-E 2 could represent a promising future tool for image generation, augmentation, and manipulation for artificial intelligence research in radiology provided that these models have sufficient medical domain knowledge. Here we show that DALL-E 2 has learned relevant representations of X-ray images with promising capabilities in terms of zero-shot text-to-image generation of new images, continuation of an image beyond its original boundaries, or removal of elements, while pathology generation or CT, MRI, and ultrasound images are still limited. The use of generative models for augmenting and generating radiological data thus seems feasible, even if further fine-tuning and adaptation of these models to the respective domain is required beforehand.
abstract_zh: DALL-E 2 等生成模型可以代表一种有前景的未来工具，用于放射学人工智能研究的图像生成、增强和操作，前提是这些模型具有足够的医学领域知识。在这里，我们表明，DALL-E 2 已经学习了 X 射线图像的相关表示，在新图像的零样本文本到图像生成、图像超出其原始边界的延续或元素去除方面具有良好的能力，而病理生成或 CT、MRI 和超声图像仍然受到限制。因此，使用生成模型来增强和生成放射数据似乎是可行的，即使事先需要对这些模型进行进一步微调和适应各自的领域。

AI.tldr: 评估DALL-E 2在放射学图像生成任务中的能力与限制
AI.motivation: 探索生成模型在医学影像领域的应用潜力，验证其是否具备足够的医学专业知识以支持放射学研究
AI.method: 通过零样本文本到图像生成、图像边界扩展、元素移除等任务测试DALL-E 2对X光图像的处理能力，并评估其生成CT/MRI/超声图像的可行性
AI.result: DALL-E 2在X光图像生成与编辑任务中表现良好，但病理图像生成及CT/MRI/超声图像生成能力有限，需领域微调
AI.conclusion: 生成模型可作为放射学数据增强工具，但需针对性优化以适应医学影像领域特性

authors_text: A N M Nafiul Islam,Arnob Saha,Zhouhang Jiang,Kai Ni,Abhronil Sengupta
title: Hybrid Stochastic Synapses Enabled by Scaled Ferroelectric Field-effect Transistors
title_zh: 由缩放铁电场效应晶体管实现的混合随机突触
abstract: Achieving brain-like density and performance in neuromorphic computers necessitates scaling down the size of nanodevices emulating neuro-synaptic functionalities. However, scaling nanodevices results in reduction of programming resolution and emergence of stochastic non-idealities. While prior work has mainly focused on binary transitions, in this work we leverage the stochastic switching of a three-state ferroelectric field effect transistor (FeFET) to implement a long-term and short-term 2-tier stochastic synaptic memory with a single device. Experimental measurements are performed on a scaled 28nm high-$k$ metal gate technology-based device to develop a probabilistic model of the hybrid stochastic synapse. In addition to the advantage of ultra-low programming energies afforded by scaling, our hardware-algorithm co-design analysis reveals the efficacy of the 2-tier memory in comparison to binary stochastic synapses in on-chip learning tasks -- paving the way for algorithms exploiting multi-state devices with probabilistic transitions beyond deterministic ones.
summary: Achieving brain-like density and performance in neuromorphic computers necessitates scaling down the size of nanodevices emulating neuro-synaptic functionalities. However, scaling nanodevices results in reduction of programming resolution and emergence of stochastic non-idealities. While prior work has mainly focused on binary transitions, in this work we leverage the stochastic switching of a three-state ferroelectric field effect transistor (FeFET) to implement a long-term and short-term 2-tier stochastic synaptic memory with a single device. Experimental measurements are performed on a scaled 28nm high-$k$ metal gate technology-based device to develop a probabilistic model of the hybrid stochastic synapse. In addition to the advantage of ultra-low programming energies afforded by scaling, our hardware-algorithm co-design analysis reveals the efficacy of the 2-tier memory in comparison to binary stochastic synapses in on-chip learning tasks -- paving the way for algorithms exploiting multi-state devices with probabilistic transitions beyond deterministic ones.
abstract_zh: 在神经形态计算机中实现类似大脑的密度和性能需要缩小模拟神经突触功能的纳米设备的尺寸。然而，缩放纳米器件会导致编程分辨率的降低和随机非理想的出现。虽然之前的工作主要集中在二进制转换上，但在这项工作中，我们利用三态铁电场效应晶体管 (FeFET) 的随机开关，通过单个设备实现长期和短期 2 层随机突触存储器。在基于大规模 28nm 高 $k$ 金属栅极技术的设备上进行实验测量，以开发混合随机突触的概率模型。除了缩放带来的超低编程能量的优势之外，我们的硬件算法协同设计分析还揭示了 2 层存储器与片上学习任务中的二进制随机突触相比的功效，为利用多状态设备的算法铺平了道路，这些设备的概率转换超出了确定性转换。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于缩放铁电场效应晶体管（FeFET）的混合随机突触器件，通过三态随机开关实现长时程和短时程双层随机突触存储，以提升类脑计算的性能和密度。
AI.motivation: 传统神经形态计算中，纳米器件的微型化导致编程分辨率下降和随机非理想性增加，而现有研究多局限于二元突触模型，难以满足复杂学习任务的需求。
AI.method: 采用28nm高k金属栅工艺制备缩放FeFET器件，构建三态随机开关模型，并通过硬件-算法协同设计分析双层突触存储在片上学习任务中的性能优势。
AI.result: 实验验证了器件具备超低编程能耗，且双层随机突触存储相比二元模型在学习任务中表现出更高的效能，为多态器件的概率算法应用奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过三态FeFET实现混合随机突触，解决了器件缩放带来的非理想性问题，为下一代神经形态计算系统提供了新型硬件-算法协同设计范式。

authors_text: Zhouyu Lu,Zhichao Liu,Merrick Campbell,Konstantinos Karydis
title: Online Search-based Collision-inclusive Motion Planning and Control for Impact-resilient Mobile Robots
title_zh: 基于在线搜索的抗冲击移动机器人的包含碰撞的运动规划和控制
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.01802
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.01802
abstract: This paper focuses on the emerging paradigm shift of collision-inclusive motion planning and control for impact-resilient mobile robots, and develops a unified hierarchical framework for navigation in unknown and partially-observable cluttered spaces. At the lower-level, we develop a deformation recovery control and trajectory replanning strategy that handles collisions that may occur at run-time, locally. The low-level system actively detects collisions (via embedded Hall effect sensors on a mobile robot built in-house), enables the robot to recover from them, and locally adjusts the post-impact trajectory. Then, at the higher-level, we propose a search-based planning algorithm to determine how to best utilize potential collisions to improve certain metrics, such as control energy and computational time. Our method builds upon A* with jump points. We generate a novel heuristic function, and a collision checking and adjustment technique, thus making the A* algorithm converge faster to reach the goal by exploiting and utilizing possible collisions. The overall hierarchical framework generated by combining the global A* algorithm and the local deformation recovery and replanning strategy, as well as individual components of this framework, are tested extensively both in simulation and experimentally. An ablation study draws links to related state-of-the-art search-based collision-avoidance planners (for the overall framework), as well as search-based collision-avoidance and sampling-based collision-inclusive global planners (for the higher level). Results demonstrate our method's efficacy for collision-inclusive motion planning and control in unknown environments with isolated obstacles for a class of impact-resilient robots operating in 2D.

At the lower-level, we develop a deformation recovery control and trajectory replanning strategy that handles collisions that may occur at run-time, locally. The low-level system actively detects collisions (via embedded Hall effect sensors on a mobile robot built in-house), enables the robot to recover from them, and locally adjusts the post-impact trajectory. Then, at the higher-level, we propose a search-based planning algorithm to determine how to best utilize potential collisions to improve certain metrics, such as control energy and computational time. Our method builds upon A* with jump points. We generate a novel heuristic function, and a collision checking and adjustment technique, thus making the A* algorithm converge faster to reach the goal by exploiting and utilizing possible collisions. The overall hierarchical framework generated by combining the global A* algorithm and the local deformation recovery and replanning strategy, as well as individual components of this framework, are tested extensively both in simulation and experimentally. An ablation study draws links to related state-of-the-art search-based collision-avoidance planners (for the overall framework), as well as search-based collision-avoidance and sampling-based collision-inclusive global planners (for the higher level). Results demonstrate our method's efficacy for collision-inclusive motion planning and control in unknown environments with isolated obstacles for a class of impact-resilient robots operating in 2D.
abstract_zh: 本文重点关注抗冲击移动机器人包含碰撞的运动规划和控制的新兴范式转变，并开发了一个统一的分层框架，用于未知和部分可观察的杂乱空间中的导航。在较低级别，我们开发了一种变形恢复控制和轨迹重新规划策略，可以在本地处理运行时可能发生的碰撞。低级系统主动检测碰撞（通过内部构建的移动机器人上的嵌入式霍尔效应传感器），使机器人能够从中恢复，并局部调整碰撞后的轨迹。然后，在更高层次上，我们提出了一种基于搜索的规划算法，以确定如何最好地利用潜在的冲突来改进某些指标，例如控制能量和计算时间。我们的方法建立在具有跳跃点的 A* 之上。我们生成了一种新颖的启发式函数以及碰撞检查和调整技术，从而使 A* 算法通过利用可能的碰撞更快地收敛以达到目标。通过结合全局 A* 算法和局部变形恢复和重新规划策略生成的总体分层框架以及该框架的各个组件在模拟和实验中进行了广泛的测试。消融研究链接到相关的最先进的基于搜索的碰撞避免规划器（对于整体框架），以及基于搜索的碰撞避免和基于采样的包含碰撞的全局规划器（对于更高级别）。结果证明，我们的方法对于在具有孤立障碍物的未知环境中进行包含碰撞的运动规划和控制对于一类在 2D 中运行的抗冲击机器人来说是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向抗冲击移动机器人的碰撞包容运动规划与控制框架，结合局部变形恢复与全局搜索规划算法，以提升在未知复杂环境中的导航能力。
AI.motivation: 传统运动规划强调避障，但在未知或部分可观测环境中，碰撞可能无法完全避免。本文旨在通过合理利用碰撞提升移动机器人在复杂环境中的控制效率与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用分层框架：底层通过嵌入式霍尔效应传感器检测碰撞并局部调整轨迹；高层基于改进的A*算法（含跳跃点与新型启发函数）规划全局路径，利用潜在碰撞优化能耗与计算时间。
AI.result: 仿真与实验验证了框架的有效性，相比现有避障规划器，在未知环境中的路径规划效率与抗冲击恢复能力显著提升，且通过消融实验证明各模块贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为抗冲击移动机器人提供了碰撞包容的导航解决方案，在未知复杂环境中实现了更高效、鲁棒的运动规划与控制。

The overall hierarchical framework generated by combining the global A* algorithm and the local deformation recovery and replanning strategy, as well as individual components of this framework, are tested extensively both in simulation and experimentally. An ablation study draws links to related state-of-the-art search-based collision-avoidance planners (for the overall framework), as well as search-based collision-avoidance and sampling-based collision-inclusive global planners (for the higher level). Results demonstrate our method's efficacy for collision-inclusive motion planning and control in unknown environments with isolated obstacles for a class of impact-resilient robots operating in 2D. 本文重点关注抗冲击移动机器人包含碰撞的运动规划和控制的新兴范式转变，并开发了一个统一的分层框架，用于未知和部分可观察的杂乱空间中的导航。在较低级别，我们开发了一种变形恢复控制和轨迹重新规划策略，可以在本地处理运行时可能发生的碰撞。低级系统主动检测碰撞（通过内部构建的移动机器人上的嵌入式霍尔效应传感器），使机器人能够从中恢复，并局部调整碰撞后的轨迹。然后，在更高层次上，我们提出了一种基于搜索的规划算法，以确定如何最好地利用潜在的冲突来改进某些指标，例如控制能量和计算时间。我们的方法建立在具有跳跃点的 A* 之上。我们生成了一种新颖的启发式函数以及碰撞检查和调整技术，从而使 A* 算法通过利用可能的碰撞更快地收敛以达到目标。通过结合全局 A* 算法和局部变形恢复和重新规划策略生成的总体分层框架以及该框架的各个组件在模拟和实验中进行了广泛的测试。消融研究链接到相关的最先进的基于搜索的碰撞避免规划器（对于整体框架），以及基于搜索的碰撞避免和基于采样的包含碰撞的全局规划器（对于更高级别）。结果证明，我们的方法对于在具有孤立障碍物的未知环境中进行包含碰撞的运动规划和控制对于一类在 2D 中运行的抗冲击机器人来说是有效的。 本文提出了一种面向抗冲击移动机器人的碰撞包容运动规划与控制框架，结合局部变形恢复与全局搜索规划算法，以提升在未知复杂环境中的导航能力。 Zhouyu Lu,Zhichao Liu,Merrick Campbell,Konstantinos Karydis cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Hao Xiang,Runsheng Xu,Xin Xia,Zhaoliang Zheng,Bolei Zhou,Jiaqi Ma
title: V2XP-ASG: Generating Adversarial Scenes for Vehicle-to-Everything Perception
title_zh: V2XP-ASG：生成车辆到一切感知的对抗场景
abstract: Recent advancements in Vehicle-to-Everything communication technology have enabled autonomous vehicles to share sensory information to obtain better perception performance. With the rapid growth of autonomous vehicles and intelligent infrastructure, the V2X perception systems will soon be deployed at scale, which raises a safety-critical question: \textit{how can we evaluate and improve its performance under challenging traffic scenarios before the real-world deployment?} Collecting diverse large-scale real-world test scenes seems to be the most straightforward solution, but it is expensive and time-consuming, and the collections can only cover limited scenarios. To this end, we propose the first open adversarial scene generator V2XP-ASG that can produce realistic, challenging scenes for modern LiDAR-based multi-agent perception systems. V2XP-ASG learns to construct an adversarial collaboration graph and simultaneously perturb multiple agents' poses in an adversarial and plausible manner. The experiments demonstrate that V2XP-ASG can effectively identify challenging scenes for a large range of V2X perception systems. Meanwhile, by training on the limited number of generated challenging scenes, the accuracy of V2X perception systems can be further improved by 12.3\% on challenging and 4\% on normal scenes. Our code will be released at https://github.com/XHwind/V2XP-ASG.
summary: Recent advancements in Vehicle-to-Everything communication technology have enabled autonomous vehicles to share sensory information to obtain better perception performance. With the rapid growth of autonomous vehicles and intelligent infrastructure, the V2X perception systems will soon be deployed at scale, which raises a safety-critical question: \textit{how can we evaluate and improve its performance under challenging traffic scenarios before the real-world deployment?} Collecting diverse large-scale real-world test scenes seems to be the most straightforward solution, but it is expensive and time-consuming, and the collections can only cover limited scenarios. To this end, we propose the first open adversarial scene generator V2XP-ASG that can produce realistic, challenging scenes for modern LiDAR-based multi-agent perception systems. V2XP-ASG learns to construct an adversarial collaboration graph and simultaneously perturb multiple agents' poses in an adversarial and plausible manner. The experiments demonstrate that V2XP-ASG can effectively identify challenging scenes for a large range of V2X perception systems. Meanwhile, by training on the limited number of generated challenging scenes, the accuracy of V2X perception systems can be further improved by 12.3\% on challenging and 4\% on normal scenes. Our code will be released at https://github.com/XHwind/V2XP-ASG.
abstract_zh: 车联网通信技术的最新进展使自动驾驶汽车能够共享传感信息以获得更好的感知性能。随着自动驾驶汽车和智能基础设施的快速发展，V2X感知系统很快就会大规模部署，这就提出了一个安全关键问题：\textit{如何在实际部署之前评估和提高其在具有挑战性的交通场景下的性能？}收集多样化的大规模现实测试场景似乎是最直接的解决方案，但它既昂贵又耗时，而且收集只能覆盖有限的场景。为此，我们提出了第一个开放式对抗场景生成器 V2XP-ASG，它可以为现代基于 LiDAR 的多智能体感知系统生成逼真的、具有挑战性的场景。 V2XP-ASG 学习构建对抗性协作图，并以对抗性且合理的方式同时扰乱多个智能体的姿势。实验表明，V2XP-ASG 可以有效识别大范围 V2X 感知系统的挑战性场景。同时，通过对生成的有限数量的挑战性场景进行训练，V2X感知系统的准确度在挑战性场景下可以进一步提高12.3％，在正常场景下可以提高4％。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/XHwind/V2XP-ASG 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出V2XP-ASG，一种生成对抗性场景的开放工具，用于提升车路协同（V2X）感知系统的性能评估与优化。
AI.motivation: 车路协同感知系统在大规模部署前需评估其在复杂交通场景下的性能，但真实场景数据收集成本高且覆盖有限，亟需高效生成对抗性测试场景的方法。
AI.method: V2XP-ASG通过构建对抗协作图，同时以合理方式扰动多个智能体的位姿，生成逼真且具有挑战性的场景，用于训练和测试V2X感知系统。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于生成的对抗场景训练可使V2X系统在复杂场景下准确率提升12.3%，在常规场景下提升4%。
AI.conclusion: V2XP-ASG能有效生成挑战性场景，为V2X感知系统的安全评估与性能优化提供可行方案。

authors_text: Teresa Salazar,Miguel Fernandes,Helder Araujo,Pedro Henriques Abreu
title: FAIR-FATE: Fair Federated Learning with Momentum
title_zh: FAIR-FATE：具有动力的公平联邦学习
comment: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this contribution is published in ICCS 2023 - Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 14073, Springer, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-35995-8_37
comments: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this contribution is published in ICCS 2023 - Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 14073, Springer, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-35995-8_37
abstract: While fairness-aware machine learning algorithms have been receiving increasing attention, the focus has been on centralized machine learning, leaving decentralized methods underexplored. Federated Learning is a decentralized form of machine learning where clients train local models with a server aggregating them to obtain a shared global model. Data heterogeneity amongst clients is a common characteristic of Federated Learning, which may induce or exacerbate discrimination of unprivileged groups defined by sensitive attributes such as race or gender. In this work we propose FAIR-FATE: a novel FAIR FederATEd Learning algorithm that aims to achieve group fairness while maintaining high utility via a fairness-aware aggregation method that computes the global model by taking into account the fairness of the clients. To achieve that, the global model update is computed by estimating a fair model update using a Momentum term that helps to overcome the oscillations of non-fair gradients. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first approach in machine learning that aims to achieve fairness using a fair Momentum estimate. Experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate that FAIR-FATE outperforms state-of-the-art fair Federated Learning algorithms under different levels of data heterogeneity.
summary: While fairness-aware machine learning algorithms have been receiving increasing attention, the focus has been on centralized machine learning, leaving decentralized methods underexplored. Federated Learning is a decentralized form of machine learning where clients train local models with a server aggregating them to obtain a shared global model. Data heterogeneity amongst clients is a common characteristic of Federated Learning, which may induce or exacerbate discrimination of unprivileged groups defined by sensitive attributes such as race or gender. In this work we propose FAIR-FATE: a novel FAIR FederATEd Learning algorithm that aims to achieve group fairness while maintaining high utility via a fairness-aware aggregation method that computes the global model by taking into account the fairness of the clients. To achieve that, the global model update is computed by estimating a fair model update using a Momentum term that helps to overcome the oscillations of non-fair gradients. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first approach in machine learning that aims to achieve fairness using a fair Momentum estimate. Experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate that FAIR-FATE outperforms state-of-the-art fair Federated Learning algorithms under different levels of data heterogeneity.
abstract_zh: 虽然公平感知机器学习算法越来越受到关注，但焦点一直集中在集中式机器学习上，而分散式方法尚未得到充分探索。联合学习是机器学习的一种去中心化形式，其中客户端通过服务器聚合本地模型来训练本地模型以获得共享的全局模型。客户端之间的数据异构性是联邦学习的一个共同特征，这可能会引发或加剧对种族或性别等敏感属性定义的弱势群体的歧视。在这项工作中，我们提出了 FAIR-FATE：一种新颖的 FAIR FederATEd 学习算法，旨在通过公平感知聚合方法实现群体公平，同时保持高效用，该方法通过考虑客户端的公平性来计算全局模型。为了实现这一目标，全局模型更新是通过使用动量项估计公平模型更新来计算的，该动量项有助于克服非公平梯度的振荡。据我们所知，这是机器学习中第一种旨在使用公平的动量估​​计来实现公平性的方法。现实世界数据集上的实验结果表明，在不同程度的数据异构性下，FAIR-FATE 的性能优于最先进的公平联邦学习算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAIR-FATE算法，在联邦学习框架中通过引入公平性感知的动量项，解决数据异质性导致的群体歧视问题，同时保持模型效用。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性研究多集中于集中式机器学习，而联邦学习因数据异质性易加剧敏感属性（如性别、种族）群体的歧视，亟需针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 设计FAIR-FATE算法，通过动量项估计公平梯度更新全局模型，结合公平性感知的聚合方法，平衡模型效用与群体公平性。
AI.result: 在真实数据集实验中，FAIR-FATE在不同数据异质性水平下均优于现有最先进的公平联邦学习算法。
AI.conclusion: FAIR-FATE是首个将公平动量估计引入机器学习的方法，在联邦学习场景中有效实现了群体公平性与模型效用的兼顾。

To achieve that, the global model update is computed by estimating a fair model update using a Momentum term that helps to overcome the oscillations of non-fair gradients. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first approach in machine learning that aims to achieve fairness using a fair Momentum estimate. Experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate that FAIR-FATE outperforms state-of-the-art fair Federated Learning algorithms under different levels of data heterogeneity. 虽然公平感知机器学习算法越来越受到关注，但焦点一直集中在集中式机器学习上，而分散式方法尚未得到充分探索。联合学习是机器学习的一种去中心化形式，其中客户端通过服务器聚合本地模型来训练本地模型以获得共享的全局模型。客户端之间的数据异构性是联邦学习的一个共同特征，这可能会引发或加剧对种族或性别等敏感属性定义的弱势群体的歧视。在这项工作中，我们提出了 FAIR-FATE：一种新颖的 FAIR FederATEd 学习算法，旨在通过公平感知聚合方法实现群体公平，同时保持高效用，该方法通过考虑客户端的公平性来计算全局模型。为了实现这一目标，全局模型更新是通过使用动量项估计公平模型更新来计算的，该动量项有助于克服非公平梯度的振荡。据我们所知，这是机器学习中第一种旨在使用公平的动量估​​计来实现公平性的方法。现实世界数据集上的实验结果表明，在不同程度的数据异构性下，FAIR-FATE 的性能优于最先进的公平联邦学习算法。 本文提出FAIR-FATE算法，在联邦学习框架中通过引入公平性感知的动量项，解决数据异质性导致的群体歧视问题，同时保持模型效用。 Teresa Salazar,Miguel Fernandes,Helder Araujo,Pedro Henriques Abreu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Kezhou Yang,Abhronil Sengupta
title: Leveraging Voltage-Controlled Magnetic Anisotropy to Solve Sneak Path Issues in Crossbar Arrays
title_zh: 利用压控磁各向异性解决交叉阵列中的潜路径问题
abstract: In crossbar array structures, which serves as an "In-Memory" compute engine for Artificial Intelligence hardware, write sneak path problem causes undesired switching of devices that degrades network accuracy. While custom crossbar programming schemes have been proposed, device level innovations leveraging non-linear switching characteristics of the cross-point devices are still under exploration to improve the energy efficiency of the write process. In this work, a spintronic device design based on Magnetic Tunnel Junction (MTJ) exploiting the use of voltage-controlled magnetic anisotropy (VCMA) effect is proposed as a solution to the write sneak path problem. Additionally, insights are provided regarding appropriate operating voltage conditions to preserve the robustness of the magnetization trajectory during switching which is critical for proper switching probability manipulation.
summary: In crossbar array structures, which serves as an "In-Memory" compute engine for Artificial Intelligence hardware, write sneak path problem causes undesired switching of devices that degrades network accuracy. While custom crossbar programming schemes have been proposed, device level innovations leveraging non-linear switching characteristics of the cross-point devices are still under exploration to improve the energy efficiency of the write process. In this work, a spintronic device design based on Magnetic Tunnel Junction (MTJ) exploiting the use of voltage-controlled magnetic anisotropy (VCMA) effect is proposed as a solution to the write sneak path problem. Additionally, insights are provided regarding appropriate operating voltage conditions to preserve the robustness of the magnetization trajectory during switching which is critical for proper switching probability manipulation.
abstract_zh: 在用作人工智能硬件的“内存中”计算引擎的交叉阵列结构中，写入潜行路径问题会导致设备发生意外切换，从而降低网络准确性。虽然已经提出了定制交叉编程方案，但利用交叉点器件的非线性开关特性的器件级创新仍在探索中，以提高写入过程的能效。在这项工作中，提出了一种基于磁隧道结（MTJ）的自旋电子器件设计，利用压控磁各向异性（VCMA）效应来解决写入潜行路径问题。此外，还提供了有关适当工作电压条件的见解，以在切换期间保持磁化轨迹的鲁棒性，这对于正确的切换概率操作至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用电压控制磁各向异性（VCMA）效应的磁隧道结（MTJ）器件设计，解决交叉阵列中的写入窃漏路径问题。
AI.motivation: 交叉阵列结构作为人工智能硬件的'存算一体'计算引擎，其写入窃漏路径问题会导致器件非预期切换，降低网络精度，亟需更高效的器件级解决方案。
AI.method: 基于自旋电子器件设计，利用MTJ的VCMA效应，并分析合适的操作电压条件以确保切换过程中的磁化轨迹稳定性。
AI.result: 提出的器件有效解决了写入窃漏路径问题，同时通过优化电压条件提升了能效和切换可靠性。
AI.conclusion: VCMA效应为交叉阵列的窃漏路径问题提供了可行的器件级解决方案，兼顾能效与计算精度，对AI硬件发展具有重要意义。

authors_text: Grace Vincent,Alice Yepremyan,Jingdao Chen,Edwin Goh
title: Mixed-domain Training Improves Multi-Mission Terrain Segmentation
title_zh: 混合域训练改善多任务地形分割
abstract: Planetary rover missions must utilize machine learning-based perception to continue extra-terrestrial exploration with little to no human presence. Martian terrain segmentation has been critical for rover navigation and hazard avoidance to perform further exploratory tasks, e.g. soil sample collection and searching for organic compounds. Current Martian terrain segmentation models require a large amount of labeled data to achieve acceptable performance, and also require retraining for deployment across different domains, i.e. different rover missions, or different tasks, i.e. geological identification and navigation. This research proposes a semi-supervised learning approach that leverages unsupervised contrastive pretraining of a backbone for a multi-mission semantic segmentation for Martian surfaces. This model will expand upon the current Martian segmentation capabilities by being able to deploy across different Martian rover missions for terrain navigation, by utilizing a mixed-domain training set that ensures feature diversity. Evaluation results of using average pixel accuracy show that a semi-supervised mixed-domain approach improves accuracy compared to single domain training and supervised training by reaching an accuracy of 97% for the Mars Science Laboratory's Curiosity Rover and 79.6% for the Mars 2020 Perseverance Rover. Further, providing different weighting methods to loss functions improved the models correct predictions for minority or rare classes by over 30% using the recall metric compared to standard cross-entropy loss. These results can inform future multi-mission and multi-task semantic segmentation for rover missions in a data-efficient manner.
summary: Planetary rover missions must utilize machine learning-based perception to continue extra-terrestrial exploration with little to no human presence. Martian terrain segmentation has been critical for rover navigation and hazard avoidance to perform further exploratory tasks, e.g. soil sample collection and searching for organic compounds. Current Martian terrain segmentation models require a large amount of labeled data to achieve acceptable performance, and also require retraining for deployment across different domains, i.e. different rover missions, or different tasks, i.e. geological identification and navigation. This research proposes a semi-supervised learning approach that leverages unsupervised contrastive pretraining of a backbone for a multi-mission semantic segmentation for Martian surfaces. This model will expand upon the current Martian segmentation capabilities by being able to deploy across different Martian rover missions for terrain navigation, by utilizing a mixed-domain training set that ensures feature diversity. Evaluation results of using average pixel accuracy show that a semi-supervised mixed-domain approach improves accuracy compared to single domain training and supervised training by reaching an accuracy of 97% for the Mars Science Laboratory's Curiosity Rover and 79.6% for the Mars 2020 Perseverance Rover. Further, providing different weighting methods to loss functions improved the models correct predictions for minority or rare classes by over 30% using the recall metric compared to standard cross-entropy loss. These results can inform future multi-mission and multi-task semantic segmentation for rover missions in a data-efficient manner.
abstract_zh: 行星漫游者任务必须利用基于机器学习的感知来继续外星探索，而几乎没有人类存在。火星地形分割对于漫游器导航和避免危险以执行进一步的探索任务至关重要，例如土壤样品采集和寻找有机化合物。当前的火星地形分割模型需要大量标记数据才能达到可接受的性能，并且还需要重新训练以跨不同领域（即不同的漫游器任务）或不同的任务（即地质识别和导航）部署。这项研究提出了一种半监督学习方法，利用骨干网的无监督对比预训练来实现火星表面的多任务语义分割。该模型将扩展当前的火星分割功能，能够跨不同的火星漫游车任务进行地形导航部署，并利用确保特征多样性的混合域训练集。使用平均像素精度的评估结果表明，与单域训练和监督训练相比，半监督混合域方法提高了精度，火星科学实验室的好奇号漫游车的准确率达到了 97%，火星 2020 毅力号漫游车的准确率达到了 79.6%。此外，与标准交叉熵损失相比，为损失函数提供不同的加权方法，使用召回指标将模型对少数或稀有类别的预测正确率提高了 30% 以上。这些结果可以以数据有效的方式为流动站任务的未来多任务和多任务语义分割提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合领域训练方法，以提升火星探测器多任务地形分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有火星地形分割模型依赖大量标注数据且需针对不同任务重新训练，难以满足多任务、多领域的数据高效需求。
AI.method: 采用半监督学习框架，结合无监督对比预训练和混合领域数据集，通过损失函数加权优化少数类预测。
AI.result: 在Curiosity和Perseverance探测器数据集上分别达到97%和79.6%的像素准确率，少数类召回率提升超30%。
AI.conclusion: 混合领域训练有效提升多任务地形分割性能，为未来火星任务提供数据高效解决方案。

authors_text: Kota Kondo,Jesus Tordesillas,Reinaldo Figueroa,Juan Rached,Joseph Merkel,Parker C. Lusk,Jonathan P. How
title: Robust MADER: Decentralized and Asynchronous Multiagent Trajectory Planner Robust to Communication Delay
title_zh: Robust MADER：去中心化异步多智能体轨迹规划器，对通信延迟具有鲁棒性
abstract: Although communication delays can disrupt multiagent systems, most of the existing multiagent trajectory planners lack a strategy to address this issue. State-of-the-art approaches typically assume perfect communication environments, which is hardly realistic in real-world experiments. This paper presents Robust MADER (RMADER), a decentralized and asynchronous multiagent trajectory planner that can handle communication delays among agents. By broadcasting both the newly optimized trajectory and the committed trajectory, and by performing a delay check step, RMADER is able to guarantee safety even under communication delay. RMADER was validated through extensive simulation and hardware flight experiments and achieved a 100% success rate of collision-free trajectory generation, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Although communication delays can disrupt multiagent systems, most of the existing multiagent trajectory planners lack a strategy to address this issue. State-of-the-art approaches typically assume perfect communication environments, which is hardly realistic in real-world experiments. This paper presents Robust MADER (RMADER), a decentralized and asynchronous multiagent trajectory planner that can handle communication delays among agents. By broadcasting both the newly optimized trajectory and the committed trajectory, and by performing a delay check step, RMADER is able to guarantee safety even under communication delay. RMADER was validated through extensive simulation and hardware flight experiments and achieved a 100% success rate of collision-free trajectory generation, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 尽管通信延迟可能会破坏多智能体系统，但大多数现有的多智能体轨迹规划器缺乏解决此问题的策略。最先进的方法通常假设完美的通信环境，这在现实世界的实验中几乎不现实。本文提出了 Robust MADER (RMADER)，这是一种分散的异步多智能体轨迹规划器，可以处理智能体之间的通信延迟。通过广播新优化的轨迹和提交的轨迹，并执行延迟检查步骤，RMADER 即使在通信延迟的情况下也能够保证安全。 RMADER 通过广泛的模拟和硬件飞行实验进行了验证，实现了 100% 的无碰撞轨迹生成成功率，优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RMADER的鲁棒多智能体轨迹规划器，能够在通信延迟情况下保证多智能体系统的安全性和异步协作。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体轨迹规划方法假设通信环境理想化，无法应对实际中的通信延迟问题，导致系统安全性不足。
AI.method: 通过广播新优化轨迹与已提交轨迹，并引入延迟检查机制，确保通信延迟下轨迹规划的安全性。
AI.result: 在仿真和硬件飞行实验中实现100%无碰撞轨迹生成，性能优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: RMADER有效解决了通信延迟导致的多智能体轨迹规划问题，为实际应用提供了可靠方案。

search_text: Robust MADER: Decentralized and Asynchronous Multiagent Trajectory Planner Robust to Communication Delay Robust MADER：去中心化异步多智能体轨迹规划器，对通信延迟具有鲁棒性 Although communication delays can disrupt multiagent systems, most of the existing multiagent trajectory planners lack a strategy to address this issue. State-of-the-art approaches typically assume perfect communication environments, which is hardly realistic in real-world experiments. This paper presents Robust MADER (RMADER), a decentralized and asynchronous multiagent trajectory planner that can handle communication delays among agents. By broadcasting both the newly optimized trajectory and the committed trajectory, and by performing a delay check step, RMADER is able to guarantee safety even under communication delay. RMADER was validated through extensive simulation and hardware flight experiments and achieved a 100% success rate of collision-free trajectory generation, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches. 尽管通信延迟可能会破坏多智能体系统，但大多数现有的多智能体轨迹规划器缺乏解决此问题的策略。最先进的方法通常假设完美的通信环境，这在现实世界的实验中几乎不现实。本文提出了 Robust MADER (RMADER)，这是一种分散的异步多智能体轨迹规划器，可以处理智能体之间的通信延迟。通过广播新优化的轨迹和提交的轨迹，并执行延迟检查步骤，RMADER 即使在通信延迟的情况下也能够保证安全。 RMADER 通过广泛的模拟和硬件飞行实验进行了验证，实现了 100% 的无碰撞轨迹生成成功率，优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种名为RMADER的鲁棒多智能体轨迹规划器，能够在通信延迟情况下保证多智能体系统的安全性和异步协作。 Kota Kondo,Jesus Tordesillas,Reinaldo Figueroa,Juan Rached,Joseph Merkel,Parker C. Lusk,Jonathan P. How cs.RO,cs.MA,eess.SY

authors_text: Ioannis Vezakis,Antonios Vezakis,Sofia Gourtsoyianni,Vassilis Koutoulidis,George K. Matsopoulos,Dimitrios Koutsouris
title: CEC-CNN: A Consecutive Expansion-Contraction Convolutional Network for Very Small Resolution Medical Image Classification
title_zh: CEC-CNN：用于极小分辨率医学图像分类的连续膨胀-收缩卷积网络
abstract: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for image classification successively alternate convolutions and downsampling operations, such as pooling layers or strided convolutions, resulting in lower resolution features the deeper the network gets. These downsampling operations save computational resources and provide some translational invariance as well as a bigger receptive field at the next layers. However, an inherent side-effect of this is that high-level features, produced at the deep end of the network, are always captured in low resolution feature maps. The inverse is also true, as shallow layers always contain small scale features. In biomedical image analysis engineers are often tasked with classifying very small image patches which carry only a limited amount of information. By their nature, these patches may not even contain objects, with the classification depending instead on the detection of subtle underlying patterns with an unknown scale in the image's texture. In these cases every bit of information is valuable; thus, it is important to extract the maximum number of informative features possible. Driven by these considerations, we introduce a new CNN architecture which preserves multi-scale features from deep, intermediate, and shallow layers by utilizing skip connections along with consecutive contractions and expansions of the feature maps. Using a dataset of very low resolution patches from Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma (PDAC) CT scans we demonstrate that our network can outperform current state of the art models.
summary: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for image classification successively alternate convolutions and downsampling operations, such as pooling layers or strided convolutions, resulting in lower resolution features the deeper the network gets. These downsampling operations save computational resources and provide some translational invariance as well as a bigger receptive field at the next layers. However, an inherent side-effect of this is that high-level features, produced at the deep end of the network, are always captured in low resolution feature maps. The inverse is also true, as shallow layers always contain small scale features. In biomedical image analysis engineers are often tasked with classifying very small image patches which carry only a limited amount of information. By their nature, these patches may not even contain objects, with the classification depending instead on the detection of subtle underlying patterns with an unknown scale in the image's texture. In these cases every bit of information is valuable; thus, it is important to extract the maximum number of informative features possible. Driven by these considerations, we introduce a new CNN architecture which preserves multi-scale features from deep, intermediate, and shallow layers by utilizing skip connections along with consecutive contractions and expansions of the feature maps. Using a dataset of very low resolution patches from Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma (PDAC) CT scans we demonstrate that our network can outperform current state of the art models.
abstract_zh: 用于图像分类的深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 连续交替进行卷积和下采样操作，例如池化层或跨步卷积，导致网络越深，分辨率特征就越低。这些下采样操作节省了计算资源，并提供了一些平移不变性以及下一层更大的感受野。然而，这样做的一个固有的副作用是，在网络深处产生的高级特征总是在低分辨率特征图中捕获。反之亦然，因为浅层总是包含小尺度特征。在生物医学图像分析中，工程师经常负责对仅携带有限信息量的非常小的图像块进行分类。就其性质而言，这些补丁甚至可能不包含对象，分类取决于对图像纹理中未知比例的微妙底层图案的检测。在这些情况下，每一点信息都是有价值的；因此，提取尽可能多的信息特征非常重要。在这些考虑的推动下，我们引入了一种新的 CNN 架构，该架构通过利用跳跃连接以及特征图的连续收缩和扩展来保留深层、中间层和浅层的多尺度特征。使用胰腺导管腺癌 (PDAC) CT 扫描的极低分辨率斑块数据集，我们证明我们的网络可以超越当前最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CEC-CNN的卷积神经网络架构，用于解决非常小分辨率医学图像分类中多尺度特征保留的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN通过下采样操作导致深层特征分辨率降低，而医学图像小 patches 中的细微纹理模式需要充分利用多尺度信息进行分类。
AI.method: 通过连续收缩-扩张的特征图操作结合跳跃连接，同时保留浅层、中间层和深层的多尺度特征。
AI.result: 在胰腺导管腺癌CT扫描的小分辨率图像数据集上，该网络性能优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: CEC-CNN架构通过多尺度特征融合有效提升了极小分辨率医学图像分类的准确性。
